body_creation_stages.f_gate: PASS: therapeutic effect of Quranic recitation measurable via cortisol/heart-rate studies

body_creation_stages.description: "And when I am ill, it is He who heals me"
body_creation_stages.f_gate: PASS: illness-recovery correlation observable — same mechanism, same outcome

body_creation_stages.description: "We clothed the bones with flesh"
body_creation_stages.f_gate: PASS: embryological bone-to-flesh sequence observable via ultrasound imaging

body_creation_stages.arabic: أَيَحْسَبُ الْإِنسَانُ أَلَّن نَّجْمَعَ عِظَامَهُ ۝ بَلَىٰ قَادِرِينَ عَلَىٰ أَن نُّسَوِّيَ بَنَانَهُ
body_creation_stages.english: a-yahsabu al-insanu al-lan najma'a 'ithamahu. Bala qadirin 'ala an nusawwiya bananahu
body_creation_stages.description: "Does man think We cannot reassemble his bones? Yes indeed — We can proportion his fingertips"
body_creation_stages.f_gate: PASS: fingerprint uniqueness is empirically verifiable — 8 billion unique patterns documented

body_creation_stages.description: "Today We will preserve you in your body"
body_creation_stages.f_gate: PASS: body preservation (mummification) is archaeologically verifiable — Firawn specimen exists

body_creation_stages.arabic: وَأَلْقَىٰ فِي الْأَرْضِ رَوَاسِيَ أَن تَمِيدَ بِكُمْ
body_creation_stages.english: wa-alqa fi al-ardi rawasiya an tamida bikum
body_creation_stages.description: "He cast firm anchors into the earth lest it sway with you"
body_creation_stages.f_gate: PASS: mountain-as-stabilizer model testable via seismological data — root systems measurable

body_creation_stages.arabic: وَجَعَلْنَا فِي الْأَرْضِ رَوَاسِيَ أَن تَمِيدَ بِهِمْ
body_creation_stages.english: wa-ja'alna fi al-ardi rawasiya an tamida bihim
body_creation_stages.description: "We placed in the earth firm mountains lest it sway with them"
body_creation_stages.f_gate: PASS: same principle as CS16 — geological pegging function of mountains is measurable

body_creation_stages.arabic: إِنَّمَا حَرَّمَ عَلَيْكُمُ الْمَيْتَةَ وَالدَّمَ وَلَحْمَ الْخِنزِيرِ
body_creation_stages.english: innama harrama 'alaykum al-maytata wa-al-dama wa-lahma al-khinzir
body_creation_stages.description: "He has only forbidden to you dead animals, blood, and flesh of swine"
body_creation_stages.f_gate: PASS: harmful effects of prohibited substances clinically documented and reproducible

body_creation_stages.arabic: لَا تُحَرِّمُوا طَيِّبَاتِ مَا أَحَلَّ اللَّهُ لَكُمْ
body_creation_stages.english: la tuharrimu tayyibati ma ahalla Allahu lakum
body_creation_stages.description: "Do not forbid the pure things Allah made lawful for you"
body_creation_stages.f_gate: PASS: nutritional benefit of permitted foods measurable via biochemical analysis

body_creation_stages.description: "They taught people sorcery"
body_creation_stages.f_gate: PASS: distinction between knowledge (ilm) and sorcery (sihr) testable by reproducibility criterion

body_creation_stages.description: "Who created you, proportioned you, and balanced you"
body_creation_stages.f_gate: PASS: creation-proportion-balance sequence observable in embryological development

body_creation_stages.description: "We created everything in due measure"
body_creation_stages.f_gate: PASS: bi-qadar (by measure) — every created entity has measurable parameters

body_creation_stages.description: "And [by] the soul and He who proportioned it"
body_creation_stages.f_gate: PASS: nafs proportioning observable via behavioural and neurological measurement

body_creation_stages.arabic: إِنَّ السَّمْعَ وَالْبَصَرَ وَالْفُؤَادَ كُلُّ أُولَٰئِكَ كَانَ عَنْهُ مَسْئُولًا
body_creation_stages.english: inna al-sam'a wa-al-basara wa-al-fu'ada kullu ula'ika kana 'anhu mas'ulan
body_creation_stages.description: "Indeed, the hearing, the sight, and the heart — all of those will be questioned"
body_creation_stages.f_gate: PASS: hearing, sight, and heart (fuad) functions independently measurable and testable

body_creation_stages.description: "Let man look at his food"
body_creation_stages.f_gate: PASS: food-to-body transformation pathway traceable via metabolic science

body_creation_stages.arabic: قُلْ أَغَيْرَ اللَّهِ أَتَّخِذُ وَلِيًّا فَاطِرِ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ وَهُوَ يُطْعِمُ وَلَا يُطْعَمُ
body_creation_stages.english: qul a-ghayra Allahi attakhidhu waliyyan fatir al-samawati wa-al-ardi wa-huwa yut'imu wa-la yut'am
body_creation_stages.description: "Say: shall I take as protector other than Allah, Originator of heavens and earth, while He feeds and is not fed?"
body_creation_stages.f_gate: PASS: sustenance dependency on Creator testable — all nutrition chains trace to earth/sun system

body_creation_stages.description: "The sun and the moon [move] by precise calculation"
body_creation_stages.f_gate: PASS: sun and moon bi-husban (by calculation) — orbital mechanics precisely measurable

body_creation_stages.arabic: وَاغْضُضْ مِن صَوْتِكَ ۚ إِنَّ أَنكَرَ الْأَصْوَاتِ لَصَوْتُ الْحَمِيرِ
body_creation_stages.english: wa-aghdud min sawtika. Inna ankara al-aswati la-sawtu al-hamir
body_creation_stages.description: "Lower your voice. Indeed the most disagreeable of sounds is the braying of donkeys"
body_creation_stages.f_gate: PASS: sound frequency impact on health measurable — volume/frequency dose-response testable

body_skeletal_map.quranic_ref: Clinical_Significance

body_skeletal_map.region: JOINT DEFINITION — المَفْصِل / al-Mafṣil / The Meeting Point (root ق-ر-ن / q-r-n / to join)
body_skeletal_map.bone_type: قَرِين / qarīn / the one joined to (root ق-ر-ن, Q4:38, Q43:36, Q50:23)
body_skeletal_map.connected_joints: A single meeting point where two structures are paired. The point where force is focused and directed. Ibn Sīnā (SC02): "The joint is the point where this force is focused and directed."
body_skeletal_map.quranic_ref: Every قَرِين is a load-transfer point. Dysfunction at ONE joint propagates through the entire network via compensation.
body_skeletal_map.clinical_notes: After 30: fascial binding at joints stiffens, reducing load-transfer ef...

body_skeletal_map.region: JOINT DEFINITION — المَفْصِل / al-Mafṣil / The Meeting Point (root ق-ر-ن / q-r-n / to join)
body_skeletal_map.bone_type: مُقَرْنَص / muqarnaṣ / joint-network (root ق-ر-ن / q-r-n / to join, to pair)
body_skeletal_map.connected_joints: The SYSTEM of joints operating as a unified load-distribution network. Not one bridge — a network of bridges distributing force across every meeting point simultaneously.
body_skeletal_map.quranic_ref: The body's مُقَرْنَصَات is the ORIGINAL (Q30:30 fiṭrah). Architectural muqarnas COPIED this algorithm into stone. Western architecture classified it as "decoration" (DP07).

body_skeletal_map.region: JOINT DEFINITION — المَفْصِل / al-Mafṣil / The Meeting Point (root ق-ر-ن / q-r-n / to join)
body_skeletal_map.bone_type: العَظْم = القَوْس / al-ʿaẓm = al-qaws / bone = bow
body_skeletal_map.connected_joints: Bone = Bow (rigid lever), Muscle/Tendon/Fascia = Bowstring (tension element), Nerve = Arrow (directed output), Joint = Archer's Hand (force application point). Ibn Sīnā (SC02): "The bone is to the muscle as the bow is to the string."
body_skeletal_map.quranic_ref: The joint (المَفْصِل) is the Archer's Hand — where the archer GRIPS and DIRECTS. Without a functioning joint, the bow-string system has no control point.

body_skeletal_map.region: MAJOR JOINT-NETWORK MAP — Which Joints, What Loads, How They Pair
body_skeletal_map.bone_type: العَمُود الفِقْرِي / al-ʿAmūd al-Fiqrī / the vertebral column
body_skeletal_map.connected_joints: The master warp line. Occipital ridge → spine → sacrum. Anti-gravity bowstring. Every spinal segment is a قَرِين pairing vertebra-to-vertebra.
body_skeletal_map.quranic_ref: Spinal joint dysfunction propagates in BOTH directions — up to cervical (headaches, jaw) AND down to sacral (SIJ, sciatic). The dorsal axial is the stable conductor.
body_skeletal_map.clinical_notes: After 30: disc dehydration begins, facet joints stif...

body_skeletal_map.region: MAJOR JOINT-NETWORK MAP — Which Joints, What Loads, How They Pair
body_skeletal_map.bone_type: المَفْصِل العَجُزِي الحَرْقَفِي / al-Mafṣil al-ʿAjuzī al-Ḥarqafī
body_skeletal_map.connected_joints: The keystone joint. Where spine meets pelvis. Transfers ALL upper-body load into lower limbs. The sacrum is the foundational keystone of the bow.
body_skeletal_map.quranic_ref: SIJ shear is the most common compensation result — when contralateral dorsal warp fails, the SIJ absorbs the asymmetry. Clinical example: left glute weakness → right SIJ shear → right sciatic irritation.

body_skeletal_map.region: MAJOR JOINT-NETWORK MAP — Which Joints, What Loads, How They Pair
body_skeletal_map.bone_type: مَفْصِل الوَرِك / Mafṣil al-Warik / hip joint
body_skeletal_map.connected_joints: Ventral Lower warp line origin. Hip flexors → quadriceps → tibialis → foot. The "step line." Deepest ball-and-socket joint in the body — maximum range, maximum load.
body_skeletal_map.quranic_ref: Hip restriction forces compensation UP (to lumbar spine) and DOWN (to knee). Most "knee problems" and "lower back problems" originate at the hip.
body_skeletal_map.clinical_notes: After 30: hip flexor shortening from sitting, labral degeneration, capsular stiffening. The most impactful s...

body_skeletal_map.region: MAJOR JOINT-NETWORK MAP — Which Joints, What Loads, How They Pair
body_skeletal_map.bone_type: مَفْصِل الرُّكْبَة / Mafṣil al-Rukbah / knee joint
body_skeletal_map.connected_joints: Hinge joint on the Ventral Lower line. Transmits load between hip and ankle. Entirely DEPENDENT on hip and ankle function — the knee has almost no independent compensation capacity.
body_skeletal_map.quranic_ref: Knee pain is almost NEVER a knee problem. It is a hip problem or an ankle problem manifesting at the knee. The knee is a symptom site, not a cause site.
body_skeletal_map.clinical_notes: After 30: meniscal wear, ligament laxity, cartilage thinning. But the CAUSE is ...

body_skeletal_map.region: MAJOR JOINT-NETWORK MAP — Which Joints, What Loads, How They Pair
body_skeletal_map.bone_type: مَفْصِل الكَتِف / Mafṣil al-Katif / shoulder joint
body_skeletal_map.connected_joints: Ventral Upper warp line. Pectorals → biceps → forearm → palm. The "curl line." Most mobile joint — greatest range, least stability. Trade-off: mobility vs. security.
body_skeletal_map.quranic_ref: Shoulder dysfunction reveals thoracic spine restriction (the shoulder compensates for a stiff upper back). Also reveals breathing pattern dysfunction — pectorals tighten when breathing shifts from diaphragmatic to chest-dominant.

body_skeletal_map.region: MAJOR JOINT-NETWORK MAP — Which Joints, What Loads, How They Pair
body_skeletal_map.bone_type: مَفْصِل الكَاحِل / Mafṣil al-Kāḥil / ankle joint
body_skeletal_map.connected_joints: Terminal anchor of the Ventral Lower line. The SIYAH (bow tip) of the lower limb. Where the entire body's gravitational load meets the ground. "The heel is the siyah of the lower limb."
body_skeletal_map.quranic_ref: Ankle restriction causes ASCENDING compensation — up through knee, hip, SIJ, all the way to cervical spine. Siyah Principle: "Dysfunction at apex often originates from misalignment at base" — and vice versa.

body_skeletal_map.region: ASYMMETRY DIAGNOSTIC — Contralateral Principle (الجَانِب المُقَابِل / al-Jānib al-Muqābil)
body_skeletal_map.bone_type: الجَانِب المُقَابِل / al-Jānib al-Muqābil / the opposite side
body_skeletal_map.connected_joints: Pain in a limb often originates from CONTRALATERAL dorsal warp restriction, not local pathology. The body cross-braces — right arm swing engages left ventral upper + right dorsal axial, and vice versa.
body_skeletal_map.quranic_ref: NEVER treat the pain site first. Assess the OPPOSITE side. Right-sided pain → check LEFT dorsal warp. Left-sided pain → check RIGHT dorsal warp.

body_skeletal_map.region: ASYMMETRY DIAGNOSTIC — Contralateral Principle (الجَانِب المُقَابِل / al-Jānib al-Muqābil)
body_skeletal_map.bone_type: سِلْسِلَة التَّعْوِيض / Silsilat al-Taʿwīḍ / compensation chain
body_skeletal_map.connected_joints: 1st: Left glute/hamstring not firing (PRIMARY CAUSE). 2nd: Right dorsal warp over-braces. 3rd: Right SIJ absorbs shear. 4th: Sciatic nerve irritated. 5th: Right calf braces. 6th: Right ankle stiffens. 7th: Right plantar fascia overloads (SYMPTOM).
body_skeletal_map.quranic_ref: Western medicine treats ORDER 7 (heel) with orthotics. Correct treatment: address ORDER 1 (left glute activation). The SYMPTOM is 7 st...

body_skeletal_map.region: ASYMMETRY DIAGNOSTIC — Contralateral Principle (الجَانِب المُقَابِل / al-Jānib al-Muqābil)
body_skeletal_map.bone_type: مَبْدَأ السِّيَاه / Mabdaʾ al-Siyāh / Siyah Principle
body_skeletal_map.connected_joints: From Turkic bow-making: the siyah is the rigid curved end-tip. Dysfunction at the apex (siyah/tip = hand, foot, head) often originates from misalignment at the base (grip = spine, pelvis). And vice versa.
body_skeletal_map.quranic_ref: Plantar fasciitis → check pelvis. Headache → check sacrum. Carpal tunnel → check thoracic spine. The endpoints are SYMPTOMS. The base is the CAUSE.

body_skeletal_map.bone_type: السَّبَب الأَوَّل / al-Sabab al-Awwal / the first cause
body_skeletal_map.connected_joints: NEVER treat the symptom site. Trace the compensation cascade back to the 1st-order cause using the contralateral principle. The symptom is orders away from the cause.
body_skeletal_map.quranic_ref: Example: right heel pain → trace back through right ankle → right calf → right SIJ → right dorsal over-brace → LEFT glute weakness (1st-order cause). Treat the LEFT side.
body_skeletal_map.clinical_notes: After 30: the cascade has fossilised over years. Must...

body_skeletal_map.bone_type: التَّقْوِيم / al-Taqwīm / straightening, adjustment
body_skeletal_map.connected_joints: From Turkic bow-making: tillering = precision adjustment of limb balance. Applied to body: heel lift (1-2 cm) = tiller adjustment. Slackens over-braced side, shifts load to weak side.
body_skeletal_map.quranic_ref: Heel lift on the SYMPTOM side reduces its over-load. This is NOT an orthotic — it is a temporary tiller to allow the weak side to re-engage. Remove once balance is restored.
body_skeletal_map.clinical_notes: After 30: tillering is often the fa...

body_skeletal_map.bone_type: تَقْوِيَة الجَانِب الضَّعِيف / Taqwiyat al-Jānib al-Ḍaʿīf / strengthening the weak side
body_skeletal_map.connected_joints: Activate the 1st-order cause — typically a glute, deep stabiliser, or core muscle that stopped firing. The weak side must be trained to re-engage BEFORE removing the tiller.
body_skeletal_map.quranic_ref: Left glute activation (clinical example) = restores bilateral balance. The weak side must FIRE, not just be strong — neuromuscular activation, not just hypertrophy.

body_skeletal_map.bone_type: رُكُوع عِلاجِي / rukūʿ ʿilājī / therapeutic ruku'
body_skeletal_map.connected_joints: Controlled loading and releasing under the living muqarnas arch. Diagnoses imbalance AND retrains cross-body coordination simultaneously. The ruku' IS the treatment — not just the diagnostic.
body_skeletal_map.quranic_ref: Ruku' loads both warps symmetrically. Asymmetry during ruku' reveals the remaining imbalance. Progressive ruku' depth retrains the joint-network to share load bilaterally.

body_skeletal_map.bone_type: إِعَادَة ضَبْط الأَلَم / Iʿādat Ḍabṭ al-Alam / pain reset
body_skeletal_map.connected_joints: Chronic pain = stuck loop oscillating at a measurable frequency. Reset frequency = pain frequency × 2.2 (11:5 ratio). Bow-string-arrow model: instrument → medium → targeted intervention.
body_skeletal_map.quranic_ref: If the loop has fossilised, the sujud interrupt (5× daily) is the manual override. Sujud forces the body into the OPPOSITE of the braced state — breaking the loop.
body_skeletal_map.clinical_notes: After 30: chronic joint pain is almost alway...

body_skeletal_map.bone_type: حِمْل الخَلِيَّة = حِمْل العَادِي × 2.2 / ḥiml al-khaliyyah = ḥiml al-ʿādī × 2.2
body_skeletal_map.connected_joints: When joint-network cell subdivision follows 11:5 proportions, load-bearing capacity per unit material = 2.2× compared to non-proportional designs.
body_skeletal_map.quranic_ref: This applies to the BODY: joints operating at 11:5 load distribution carry 2.2× more load per unit tissue than randomly loaded joints. The muqarnaṣāt IS a load-capacity formula.
body_skeletal_map.clinical_notes: After 30: joints operating OUTSIDE 11:5 proportions d...

body_skeletal_map.bone_type: طُول السَّاعِد / تَرَدُّد النَّفَس = 2.2 / ṭūl al-sāʿid / taraddud al-nafas = 2.2
body_skeletal_map.connected_joints: Forearm length ÷ breath cycle period = 2.2. Same 11:5 ratio governs neural fold patterns and alveolar branching. Human body dimensions maintain 11:5 ratio with biological oscillation rates.
body_skeletal_map.quranic_ref: Joint health is connected to BREATH. The joint-network oscillation frequency must match the body's biological rhythms. Disrupted breathing → disrupted joint loading patterns.

body_skeletal_map.connected_joints: 7 essential prayer components × 5 daily performances = 7:5 = 1.4. With Sunnah additions → 11:5 = 2.2. The prayer structure IS the joint-network maintenance algorithm.
body_skeletal_map.quranic_ref: The prayer is not merely a spiritual practice WITH physical benefits. The prayer IS the joint-network calibration protocol operating at the universal 11:5 ratio.
body_skeletal_map.clinical_notes: After 30: performing ALL 5 daily prayers with proper form = the minim...

body_skeletal_map.bone_type: ثَلَاثَة مُسْتَوَيَات / thalāthat mustawayāt / three levels
body_skeletal_map.connected_joints: MICRO: Fascial warp/weft/bias (textile-like collagen layering). MESO: Bow laminations (sinew tension + horn compression + wood core). MACRO: Muqarnaṣāt cells (modular 3D tessellation). SAME algorithm at ALL scales.
body_skeletal_map.quranic_ref: Joint health operates at ALL three scales simultaneously. Micro (fascial quality), Meso (muscle-bone-tendon integration), Macro (whole-body joint-network coordination). Cannot tre...

formula_ratios.content: USLaP FORMULA RESTORATION MASTER — بِنْيَة النِّسْبَة (Ratio Architecture)
THE 7:5 KERNEL (بِذْرَة / bidhrah / Seed)
7 verses of Al-Fatihah : 5 daily salawat = 7:5 = 1.4
In every physical system: 7 observable properties : 5 Divine constraints = KERNEL
The 5 constraints: intent (نِيَّة), rule (حُكْم), boundary (حَدّ), consequence (عاقِبَة), accountability (حِسَاب)
Source: Qur'an, Surah Al-Fatihah (7 ayat) + 5 daily salawat
THE 11:5 EXPANSION (قَدْر / Qadr / Due Measure)
7 expands to 11 (minimal stable expansion), same 5 constraints = 11:5 = 2.2
Qur'an 54:49: inna kulla shay'in khalaqnahu bi-qadar
('We created everything in due measure')
Root: qaf-dal-ra (q-d-r) — Qur'an 54:49
Scale-invariant: 88 x 2^n
| Scale | Length | Frequency | Ratio |
THE 88:40 DOMBRA مِنْهَاج / MINHĀJ / ESTABLISHED METHODOLOGY
al-Dombra (الدُّومْبِرَا) — therapeutic instrument, NOT 'musical instrument'
String length: 88 units | Operating frequency: 40 CPM (cycles per minute)
88:40 = 22:10 = 11:5 = 2.2 = THE UNIVERSAL CONSTANT
Cross-domain: forearm:breath, muqarnas architecture, yurt proportions, fever restoration
THE Hz CONCEALMENT MECHANISM (60:1 ERROR)
Hz (cycles/second) + Metres HIDES the 11:5 ratio
CPM (cycles/minute) REVEALS it: Length/Frequency = 2.2 ALWAYS
Human biology operates on MINUTE-based rhythms:
Heart: 60-100 CPM | Breath: 12-20 CPM | Fever: ~40 CPM
Modern '40 Hz therapy' = 40 cycles/SECOND = 2,400 CPM (60x WRONG RATE)
Person-named units (Hertz, Newton, Joule) SEVER learner from the pattern
THREE-LAYER MEASUREMENT ARCHITECTURE
Layer 1: PURE RATIOS — 7:5 kernel, 11:5 expansion (NO UNITS)
Layer 2: User's unit selection (metres, cubits, handspans — ANY unit)
Layer 3: Calculation service (ratio x your unit = your answer)
The RATIOS are the science. The UNITS are just local implementation.
3000-YEAR CONCEALMENT TIMELINE
~2000 BCE: Suhuf Ibrahim (Q87:18-19) — science revealed as Divine guidance
~1400-1000 BCE: Torah + Zabur — continued revelation with scientific content
Pre-7th century: ASB scientists OBSERVED natural patterns, documented in Bitig script
610-632 CE: Qur'an CONFIRMED what was observed — specific ayat for each domain
7th-10th century: ASB scholars translated to Arabic for universal dissemination

8-STEP KNOWLEDGE THEFT CYCLE
Step 1: RECONNAISSANCE | Identify ASB knowledge centres: Bayt al-Hikma (Baghdad), Merv, Bukhara, Samarkand, Qashqar libraries. Map what exists.
Step 2: ENTRANCE | Enter ASB territories via trade (Venice/Genoa), Crusades (1096-1291), "Reconquista" (711-1492), diplomatic missions. Gain physical access to manuscripts.

Step 3: INFILTRATE & POSITION | Establish translation centres: Toledo (1126+), Palermo (Norman Sicily), Padua/Bologna. Position operatives as "scholars." Create universities as rebranding infrastructure.

Step 4: DIVIDE THE HOST (Q28:4) | Split unified ASB علم ('ilm / knowledge) into Western "disciplines" (physics, chemistry, etc.) — each silo prevents reassembly. جَعَلَ أَهْلَهَا شِيَعًا — "made its people into factions."

Step 5: FUND & ARM BOTH SIDES | Fund translation AND destruction simultaneously. Crusade plunder finances university founding. Mongol destruction (1220) creates manuscript vacuum that translations fill.
Step 6: EXTRACT (الْحَرْثَ + النَّسْلَ) | Steal formulas, rebrand under proxy names (DP10). Strip divine causation (مُسَبِّب → "natural law"). This is the primary step where 193 formulas were stolen.

nafs_architecture.quranic_text: إِنَّ النَّفْسَ لَأَمَّارَةٌ بِالسُّوءِ / inna al-nafsa la-ammāratun bi-l-sūʾ / indeed the self commands to evil
nafs_architecture.description: Lowest nafs level — dominated by desire, impulse, and heedlessness. The nafs in its raw state before purification. Associated with شَهْوَة / shahwah / desire and غَفْلَة / ghaflah / heedlessness.

nafs_architecture.quranic_text: وَلَا أُقْسِمُ بِالنَّفْسِ اللَّوَّامَةِ / wa-lā uqsimu bi-l-nafsi al-lawwāmah / and I swear by the self-reproaching soul
nafs_architecture.description: Second level — the self that blames itself after sin. Awareness of wrongdoing. Conscience active. Associated with نَدَم / nadam / regret and مُحَاسَبَة / muḥāsabah / self-reckoning.

nafs_architecture.quranic_text: فَأَلْهَمَهَا فُجُورَهَا وَتَقْوَاهَا / fa-alhamahā fujūrahā wa-taqwāhā / and inspired it with its wickedness and its righteousness
nafs_architecture.description: Third level — the self that receives divine inspiration. Can distinguish between فُجُور / fujūr / wickedness and تَقْوَى / taqwā / God-consciousness. Spiritual discernment activates.

nafs_architecture.quranic_text: يَا أَيَّتُهَا النَّفْسُ الْمُطْمَئِنَّةُ / yā ayyatuhā al-nafsu al-muṭmaʾinnah / O tranquil soul
nafs_architecture.description: Fourth level — the self at peace. Complete trust in Allah. No anxiety about provision, death, or trials. The heart finds rest: أَلَا بِذِكْرِ اللَّهِ تَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ (Q13:28). This is the station of سَكِينَة / sakīnah / tranquility.

nafs_architecture.quranic_text: ارْجِعِي إِلَىٰ رَبِّكِ رَاضِيَةً / irjiʿī ilā rabbiki rāḍiyatan / return to your Lord, pleased
nafs_architecture.description: Fifth level — the self that is pleased with Allah in all circumstances. رِضَا / riḍā / divine pleasure. Accepts every decree: لَا يَسْخَطُ مِنَ الْقَضَاءِ. Complete contentment.

nafs_architecture.quranic_text: مَرْضِيَّةً / marḍiyyatan / [and He is] pleased [with you]
nafs_architecture.description: Sixth level — not only is the self pleased, but Allah is pleased with it. Mutual رِضَا. Bi-directional: the servant is pleased with Allah AND Allah is pleased with the servant. This is the station of وِلَايَة / wilāyah / divine friendship.

nafs_architecture.quranic_text: الْيَوْمَ أَكْمَلْتُ لَكُمْ دِينَكُمْ / al-yawma akmaltu lakum dīnakum / this day I have perfected for you your religion
nafs_architecture.description: Seventh and final level — the self perfected. The Prophetic station: خُلُقٍ عَظِيمٍ (Q68:4). Full alignment of body, heart, and soul with divine will. عَبْدٌ / ʿabd / true servitude. The state the Qur'an was sent to restore.

nafs_architecture.quranic_text: أَلَمْ نَشْرَحْ لَكَ صَدْرَكَ / a-lam nashraḥ laka ṣadraka / did We not expand for you your breast
nafs_architecture.description: The صَدْر is the CONTAINER of the قَلْب (heart). It is the emotional center — شِفَاءٌ لِمَا فِي الصُّدُورِ (Q10:57). The Qur'an heals what is IN the breasts. Waswās operates IN the breasts (Q114:5). Expansion (شَرْح) of the ṣadr = emotional healing.

nafs_architecture.english: The heart — seat of intellect and emotion
nafs_architecture.quranic_text: فَإِنَّهَا لَا تَعْمَى الْأَبْصَارُ وَلَٰكِنْ تَعْمَى الْقُلُوبُ الَّتِي فِي الصُّدُورِ / fa-innahā lā taʿmā al-abṣāru wa-lākin taʿmā al-qulūbu allatī fī al-ṣudūr / it is not the eyes that are blind, but the hearts within the breasts
nafs_architecture.description: The قَلْب sits INSIDE the صَدْر. It is the organ of understanding (not just feeling). أَفَلَمْ يَسِيرُوا فِي الْأَرْضِ فَتَكُونَ لَهُمْ قُلُوبٌ يَعْقِلُونَ بِهَا (Q22:46). Hearts that REASON. The Qur'anic model: heart = intellect + emotion unified. Western separation of "heart" from "brain" is contamination.

nafs_architecture.quranic_text: مَا كَذَبَ الْفُؤَادُ مَا رَأَىٰ / mā kadhaba al-fuʾādu mā raʾā / the heart did not lie about what it saw
nafs_architecture.description: The فُؤَاد is DEEPER than the قَلْب — it is the organ of spiritual vision and inner certainty. When the Prophet ﷺ saw Jibrīl, it was the fuʾād that witnessed (Q53:11). The fuʾād can be empty from shock: وَأَصْبَحَ فُؤَادُ أُمِّ مُوسَىٰ فَارِغًا (Q28:10).

nafs_architecture.quranic_text: إِنَّ فِي خَلْقِ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ وَاخْتِلَافِ اللَّيْلِ وَالنَّهَارِ لَآيَاتٍ لِأُولِي الْأَلْبَابِ / inna fī khalqi al-samāwāti wa-l-arḍi... la-āyātin li-ulī al-albāb / in the creation of heavens and earth... are signs for those of understanding
nafs_architecture.description: أُولُو الْأَلْبَابِ — people of the cores/kernels. The deepest faculty of reason. Mentioned 16 times in the Qur'an. The lubb is the KERNEL of the heart — pure intellect stripped of desire and bias.

nafs_architecture.quranic_text: فَإِذَا سَوَّيْتُهُ وَنَفَخْتُ فِيهِ مِنْ رُوحِي / fa-idhā sawwaytuhu wa-nafakhtu fīhi min rūḥī / when I have proportioned him and breathed into him of My spirit
nafs_architecture.description: The رُوح is the divine breath that animates the body. It is NOT the nafs — it is from Allah. وَيَسْأَلُونَكَ عَنِ الرُّوحِ قُلِ الرُّوحُ مِنْ أَمْرِ رَبِّي (Q17:85). The spirit is from the command of Allah. Emotional health requires alignment of nafs WITH the rūḥ.

qalb_states.quranic_text: فِي قُلُوبِهِمْ مَرَضٌ فَزَادَهُمُ اللَّهُ مَرَضًا / fī qulūbihim maraḍun fa-zādahumu Allāhu maraḍan / in their hearts is disease, and Allah has increased their disease
qalb_states.description: Root disease of the heart — hypocrisy, doubt, insincerity. Allah INCREASES the disease as punishment for choosing it. The مَرَض is not physical — it is spiritual corruption that manifests in behavior.
qalb_states.diagnostic_sign: Inconsistency between speech and action, lying

qalb_states.quranic_text: خَتَمَ اللَّهُ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِمْ وَعَلَىٰ سَمْعِهِمْ وَعَلَىٰ أَبْصَارِهِمْ غِشَاوَةٌ / khatama Allāhu ʿalā qulūbihim wa-ʿalā samʿihim wa-ʿalā abṣārihim ghishāwah / Allah has sealed their hearts and their hearing, and over their eyes is a veil
qalb_states.description: Terminal state — the seal. Hearts, hearing, AND vision all locked. This is the consequence of persistent rejection. Triple seal: قُلُوب (hearts) + سَمْع (hearing) + أَبْصَار (vision). Systematic shutdown of all perception channels.
qalb_states.diagnostic_sign: Complete inability to receive guidance, arrogance
qalb_states.treatment: N/A — divine seal, only Allah removes

qalb_states.quranic_text: ثُمَّ قَسَتْ قُلُوبُكُمْ مِنْ بَعْدِ ذَٰلِكَ فَهِيَ كَالْحِجَارَةِ أَوْ أَشَدُّ قَسْوَةً / thumma qasat qulūbukum min baʿdi dhālika fa-hiya ka-l-ḥijārati aw ashaddu qaswatan / then your hearts hardened after that, so they are like stones or even harder
qalb_states.description: Hardened heart — worse than stone. Stones at least crack and water flows from them. The hardened heart cannot receive mercy, cannot weep, cannot be moved. Caused by persistent sin after clear signs.
qalb_states.diagnostic_sign: Inability to cry, no empathy, cruel behavior

qalb_states.quranic_text: وَجَعَلْنَا عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِمْ أَكِنَّةً أَنْ يَفْقَهُوهُ / wa-jaʿalnā ʿalā qulūbihim akinnatan an yafqahūhu / and We have placed over their hearts coverings lest they understand it
qalb_states.description: Coverings/wrappings that prevent understanding. Different from seal — these can potentially be removed. The أَكِنَّة prevents فِقْه (deep understanding), not basic hearing.
qalb_states.diagnostic_sign: Hears truth but cannot internalize it, intellectual resistance

qalb_states.quranic_text: فَأَمَّا الَّذِينَ فِي قُلُوبِهِمْ زَيْغٌ / fa-ammā alladhīna fī qulūbihim zayghun / as for those in whose hearts is deviation
qalb_states.description: Hearts with زَيْغ seek the مُتَشَابِه (ambiguous verses) to cause فِتْنَة (trial/corruption). They pursue obscurities to justify deviance. This is intellectual dishonesty rooted in the heart.

qalb_states.quranic_text: كَلَّا بَلْ رَانَ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِمْ مَا كَانُوا يَكْسِبُونَ / kallā bal rāna ʿalā qulūbihim mā kānū yaksibūn / no, but their deeds have rusted upon their hearts
qalb_states.description: Accumulation of sin creates a رَان (rust/stain) on the heart. Each sin adds a black dot until the heart is completely covered. Hadith: "When a servant commits a sin, a black spot is placed on his heart." Progressive darkening.
qalb_states.diagnostic_sign: Gradual loss of sensitivity to sin, normalization of wrong

qalb_states.quranic_text: وَقَالُوا قُلُوبُنَا غُلْفٌ بَلْ لَعَنَهُمُ اللَّهُ بِكُفْرِهِمْ / wa-qālū qulūbunā ghulfun bal laʿanahumu Allāhu bi-kufrihim / and they said our hearts are wrapped, but Allah cursed them for their disbelief
qalb_states.description: Banī Isrāʾīl claimed their hearts were already full/wrapped (cannot receive more guidance). An excuse-claim. Allah responds: it is not wrapping but laʿnah (curse) due to their kufr.
qalb_states.diagnostic_sign: Claim of "already knowing," arrogant dismissal of guidance

qalb_states.quranic_text: إِلَّا مَنْ أَتَى اللَّهَ بِقَلْبٍ سَلِيمٍ / illā man atā Allāha bi-qalbin salīm / except one who comes to Allah with a sound heart
qalb_states.description: The GOAL state — a heart free from shirk, hypocrisy, hatred, envy. On the Day neither wealth nor children benefit — only the qalb salīm. This is the heart of Ibrāhīm عليه السلام (Q37:84). Root س-ل-م = the same root as إِسْلَام.
qalb_states.diagnostic_sign: Consistency, generosity, truthfulness, absence of malice

qalb_states.quranic_text: أَلَا بِذِكْرِ اللَّهِ تَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ / a-lā bi-dhikri Allāhi taṭmaʾinnu al-qulūb / indeed, in the remembrance of Allah do hearts find rest
qalb_states.description: The direct Qur'anic prescription for emotional healing: dhikr = heart tranquility. This is NOT metaphorical — it is a MECHANISM. Remembrance of Allah is the active treatment that produces سَكِينَة (tranquility) in the heart.
qalb_states.diagnostic_sign: Inner peace, absence of anxiety, contentment

qalb_states.quranic_text: أَلَمْ نَشْرَحْ لَكَ صَدْرَكَ / a-lam nashraḥ laka ṣadraka / did We not expand for you your breast
qalb_states.description: Allah expanded the breast of the Prophet ﷺ — removing constriction, creating space for guidance and light. Also Q39:22: أَفَمَنْ شَرَحَ اللَّهُ صَدْرَهُ لِلْإِسْلَامِ — whoever Allah expands his breast to Islam. The OPPOSITE is ضِيقٌ (constriction) — Q6:125.
qalb_states.diagnostic_sign: Ease in worship, acceptance of trials, openness to truth

qalb_states.quranic_text: هُوَ الَّذِي أَنْزَلَ السَّكِينَةَ فِي قُلُوبِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ / huwa alladhī anzala al-sakīnata fī qulūbi al-muʾminīn / He is the one who sent down tranquility into the hearts of the believers
qalb_states.description: السَّكِينَة is SENT DOWN by Allah — it is a divine gift, not self-generated. Mentioned in Q48:4, Q48:18, Q48:26, Q9:26, Q9:40, Q2:248. It descends during moments of crisis (Badr, Ḥudaybiyyah, cave of Thawr). The word shares the root with سَكَنَ (to dwell/settle).
qalb_states.diagnostic_sign: Deep calm in crisis, trust in divine plan, steadfastness

qalb_states.quranic_text: مَنْ خَشِيَ الرَّحْمَٰنَ بِالْغَيْبِ وَجَاءَ بِقَلْبٍ مُنِيبٍ / man khashiya al-Raḥmāna bi-l-ghaybi wa-jāʾa bi-qalbin munīb / who feared the Most Merciful unseen and came with a heart turning in repentance
qalb_states.description: The munīb heart — always turning back to Allah. From root ن-و-ب (to return/turn). This is the active state of repentance — not a one-time event but a continuous orientation of the heart toward Allah.

qalb_states.quranic_text: وَالَّذِينَ يُؤْتُونَ مَا آتَوْا وَقُلُوبُهُمْ وَجِلَةٌ / wa-lladhīna yuʾtūna mā ātaw wa-qulūbuhum wajilah / those who give what they give while their hearts tremble
qalb_states.description: Healthy fear — وَجَل. The believers give charity, pray, fast — and STILL their hearts tremble that it might not be accepted. This is the OPPOSITE of complacency. The Prophet ﷺ confirmed: they do good deeds while fearing they may not be sufficient.
qalb_states.diagnostic_sign: Humility despite good deeds, never self-satisfied

qalb_states.quranic_text: يَخَافُونَ يَوْمًا تَتَقَلَّبُ فِيهِ الْقُلُوبُ وَالْأَبْصَارُ / yakhāfūna yawman tataqallabu fīhi al-qulūbu wa-l-abṣār / they fear a day in which hearts and eyes will turn about
qalb_states.description: The very NAME قَلْب comes from ق-ل-ب (to turn/flip). The heart is by nature a turning organ — it can flip between states. يَا مُقَلِّبَ الْقُلُوبِ ثَبِّتْ قَلْبِي عَلَى دِينِكَ — the Prophet's duʿāʾ asking Allah to keep his heart firm.
qalb_states.diagnostic_sign: Heart instability, mood fluctuation, spiritual inconsistency

qalb_states.quranic_text: لَوْلَا أَنْ رَبَطْنَا عَلَىٰ قَلْبِهَا / lawlā an rabaṭnā ʿalā qalbihā / had We not bound [strengthened] her heart
qalb_states.description: Allah binds/strengthens hearts in moments of extreme distress. Umm Mūsā's heart was about to reveal her secret — Allah bound it. Also Q18:14 (Aṣḥāb al-Kahf) and Q8:11. Divine emotional support at moments of crisis.
qalb_states.diagnostic_sign: Recovery from trauma, sudden courage in crisis

emotional_disorders.quranic_text: مِنْ شَرِّ الْوَسْوَاسِ الْخَنَّاسِ ۝ الَّذِي يُوَسْوِسُ فِي صُدُورِ النَّاسِ / min sharri al-waswāsi al-khannās alladhī yuwaswisu fī ṣudūri al-nās / from the evil of the retreating whisperer who whispers in the breasts of mankind
emotional_disorders.description: الوَسْوَسَة — the foundational emotional disorder. Shayṭān whispers IN the breasts (صُدُور), not in the brain. The whisperer is خَنَّاس (retreating) — he retreats when dhikr is made. Q7:20: Satan whispered to Ādam and Ḥawwāʾ. Q20:120: whispered to Ādam specifically. Mechanism: plants doubt, desire, fear.
emotional_disorders.contaminated_term: "Anxiety disorder" — contaminated: removes the agent (Shayṭān) and treats symptom only
emotional_disorders.body_manifestation: Chest tightness, racing heart, insomnia, restlessness

emotional_disorders.quranic_text: وَمِنْ شَرِّ حَاسِدٍ إِذَا حَسَدَ / wa-min sharri ḥāsidin idhā ḥasad / and from the evil of an envier when he envies
emotional_disorders.description: حَسَد is SO dangerous it has its own Qur'anic refuge formula (Q113:5). It destroyed the first relationship (Qābīl envied Hābīl, Q5:27-30). It is the disease of Iblīs (envied Ādam's status). حَسَد corrodes the حَاسِد (envier) first — "it eats good deeds as fire eats wood."
emotional_disorders.body_manifestation: Burning in chest, sleeplessness, obsessive comparison

emotional_disorders.quranic_text: إِنَّ الَّذِينَ يُجَادِلُونَ فِي آيَاتِ اللَّهِ بِغَيْرِ سُلْطَانٍ أَتَاهُمْ إِنْ فِي صُدُورِهِمْ إِلَّا كِبْرٌ / inna alladhīna yujādilūna fī āyāti Allāhi bi-ghayri sulṭānin atāhum in fī ṣudūrihim illā kibr / those who dispute the signs of Allah without authority — in their breasts is only arrogance
emotional_disorders.description: الكِبْر — arrogance in the BREASTS (صُدُور). It is the disease of Iblīs (Q2:34: أَبَىٰ وَاسْتَكْبَرَ). Hadith: "No one with a mustard seed of kibr enters Jannah." Definition: بَطَرُ الْحَقِّ وَغَمْطُ النَّاسِ — rejecting truth and despising people.
emotional_disorders.contaminated_term: "Self-confidence" — contaminated: kibr repackaged as positive trait
emotional_disorders.body_manifestation: Stiff neck, rigid posture, inability to bow (physical and spiritual)

emotional_disorders.quranic_text: إِنَّمَا أَشْكُو بَثِّي وَحُزْنِي إِلَى اللَّهِ / innamā ashkū baththī wa-ḥuznī ilā Allāh / I only complain of my grief and sorrow to Allah
emotional_disorders.description: Ya'qūb عليه السلام's model of grief: he grieved deeply for Yūsuf — so deeply his eyes whitened from tears (Q12:84). But he directed his grief TO ALLAH, not to people. He said: فَصَبْرٌ جَمِيلٌ (beautiful patience). Grief is NATURAL — the Prophet ﷺ wept. The disorder is when grief is directed AWAY from Allah.
emotional_disorders.contaminated_term: "Depression" — contaminated: removes hope in Allah, treats with chemicals only
emotional_disorders.body_manifestation: Whitening of eyes (Q12:84), loss of appetite, withdrawal

emotional_disorders.quranic_text: فَمَنْ تَبِعَ هُدَايَ فَلَا خَوْفٌ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا هُمْ يَحْزَنُونَ / fa-man tabiʿa hudāya fa-lā khawfun ʿalayhim wa-lā hum yaḥzanūn / whoever follows My guidance — no fear upon them, nor shall they grieve
emotional_disorders.description: The Qur'an treats خَوْف and حُزْن as a PAIR — they always appear together. Fear (future) + grief (past). The cure for BOTH: follow divine guidance. Healthy fear (خَشْيَة of Allah) is POSITIVE. Disordered fear (of creation, of death, of poverty) is the disease.
emotional_disorders.body_manifestation: Racing heart, sweating, trembling, chest constriction

emotional_disorders.quranic_text: لَا تَقْنَطُوا مِنْ رَحْمَةِ اللَّهِ / lā taqnaṭū min raḥmati Allāh / do not despair of the mercy of Allah
emotional_disorders.description: اليَأْس from Allah's mercy is HARĀM. Q12:87: لَا يَيْأَسُ مِنْ رَوْحِ اللَّهِ إِلَّا الْقَوْمُ الْكَافِرُونَ — only the disbelieving people despair of Allah's mercy. Despair is a form of KUFR — it denies Allah's attribute of الرَّحْمَة. The cure is in the same ayah: إِنَّ اللَّهَ يَغْفِرُ الذُّنُوبَ جَمِيعًا.
emotional_disorders.contaminated_term: "Clinical depression" — contaminated: removes the rahmah solution
emotional_disorders.body_manifestation: Complete withdrawal, loss of function, self-harm impulse

emotional_disorders.quranic_text: وَالْكَاظِمِينَ الْغَيْظَ وَالْعَافِينَ عَنِ النَّاسِ / wa-l-kāẓimīna al-ghayẓa wa-l-ʿāfīna ʿani al-nās / those who restrain anger and pardon the people
emotional_disorders.description: Uncontrolled غَضَب (anger) is destructive. But the Qur'an does NOT say "eliminate anger" — it says كَاظِمِين (restrain/swallow) + عَافِين (pardon). Two-stage treatment: FIRST restrain, THEN pardon. The Prophet ﷺ: "The strong man is not the wrestler — the strong man is he who controls himself in anger."
emotional_disorders.contaminated_term: "Anger management" — contaminated: removes the ʿafw (pardon) dimension
emotional_disorders.body_manifestation: High blood pressure, muscle tension, facial flushing

emotional_disorders.quranic_text: الَّذِينَ يَبْخَلُونَ وَيَأْمُرُونَ النَّاسَ بِالْبُخْلِ / alladhīna yabkhalūna wa-yaʾmurūna al-nāsa bi-l-bukhl / those who are miserly and command others to miserliness
emotional_disorders.description: البُخْل — miserliness is an emotional disease, not just a financial behavior. It reflects distrust in Allah's provision (رِزْق). The miser does not just withhold wealth — he withhold kindness, knowledge, mercy. Q47:38: whoever withholds withholds from himself.
emotional_disorders.contaminated_term: "Frugality" — contaminated: bukhl repackaged as financial prudence
emotional_disorders.body_manifestation: Stomach tension, anxiety about spending, sleeplessness

emotional_disorders.quranic_text: يُرَاءُونَ النَّاسَ وَلَا يَذْكُرُونَ اللَّهَ إِلَّا قَلِيلًا / yurāʾūna al-nāsa wa-lā yadhkurūna Allāha illā qalīlan / they show off to the people and do not remember Allah except little
emotional_disorders.description: الرِّيَاء — doing good deeds for people's observation, not for Allah. Called الشِّرْكُ الْأَصْغَر (minor shirk) by the Prophet ﷺ. It voids the deed. The riyāʾ patient is ADDICTED to external validation — modern social media is riyāʾ industrialized.
emotional_disorders.contaminated_term: "Personal branding" — contaminated: riya repackaged as self-promotion
emotional_disorders.body_manifestation: Anxiety when unobserved, depression when unvalidated

emotional_disorders.quranic_text: أُولَٰئِكَ كَالْأَنْعَامِ بَلْ هُمْ أَضَلُّ أُولَٰئِكَ هُمُ الْغَافِلُونَ / ulāʾika ka-l-anʿāmi bal hum aḍallu ulāʾika humu al-ghāfilūn / they are like cattle, rather they are more astray — they are the heedless
emotional_disorders.description: الغَفْلَة — spiritual anaesthesia. The ghāfil has eyes, ears, heart — but none function. WORSE than animals because animals follow their fiṭrah while the ghāfil actively suppresses theirs. Q7:179: they have hearts but do not understand, eyes but do not see, ears but do not hear.
emotional_disorders.contaminated_term: "Mindlessness" — contaminated: removes the divine purpose dimension
emotional_disorders.body_manifestation: Autopilot living, no emotional response to worship, mechanical existence

emotional_disorders.quranic_text: فَأَلْهَمَهَا فُجُورَهَا وَتَقْوَاهَا / fa-alhamahā fujūrahā wa-taqwāhā / and inspired it with its wickedness and its righteousness
emotional_disorders.description: الفُجُور is embedded in the nafs BY DESIGN (Q91:8) — alongside تَقْوَى. The human is given BOTH impulses. The test is: قَدْ أَفْلَحَ مَنْ زَكَّاهَا (Q91:9) — whoever purifies the nafs succeeds. Fujūr is not an external infection — it is an internal tendency that must be actively suppressed through تَزْكِيَة.
emotional_disorders.contaminated_term: "Self-expression" — contaminated: fujur repackaged as personal freedom
emotional_disorders.body_manifestation: Chronic guilt (if conscience active), or complete numbness (if ghaflah)

emotional_disorders.quranic_text: فَمِنْهُمْ ظَالِمٌ لِنَفْسِهِ / fa-minhum ẓālimun li-nafsihi / among them is he who wrongs himself
emotional_disorders.description: ظُلْم النَّفْس — the self-inflicted wound. Every sin is first and foremost ẓulm against one's OWN nafs. Q7:23 (Ādam's repentance): رَبَّنَا ظَلَمْنَا أَنْفُسَنَا — our Lord, we have wronged ourselves. Sin is not just disobedience — it is self-harm. The sinner is the PRIMARY victim of their own sin.
emotional_disorders.contaminated_term: "Self-harm" — contaminated: removes the sin dimension, treats behavior only
emotional_disorders.body_manifestation: Guilt, shame, physical self-neglect, substance abuse

emotional_disorders.quranic_text: وَيَوْمَ حُنَيْنٍ إِذْ أَعْجَبَتْكُمْ كَثْرَتُكُمْ / wa-yawma ḥunayinin idh aʿjabatkum kathratukum / and on the day of Ḥunayn when your great number pleased you
emotional_disorders.description: العُجْب — self-admiration that leads to complacency. At Ḥunayn, the Muslims admired their own numbers — and initially lost. Self-admiration blinds one to dependency on Allah. Different from كِبْر: kibr is looking DOWN on others; ʿujb is looking UP at oneself.
emotional_disorders.contaminated_term: "Self-esteem" — contaminated: ʿujb repackaged as healthy self-regard
emotional_disorders.body_manifestation: Overconfidence, underestimation of challenges, surprise at failure

emotional_disorders.quranic_text: يَا حَسْرَتَا عَلَىٰ مَا فَرَّطْتُ فِي جَنْبِ اللَّهِ / yā ḥasratā ʿalā mā farraṭtu fī janbi Allāh / oh my regret over what I neglected in regard to Allah
emotional_disorders.description: الحَسْرَة — the most intense form of regret. Q3:156, Q6:31, Q36:30, Q39:56. On the Day of Judgment, every soul will say يَا حَسْرَتَا. The anguish of knowing you had the chance and wasted it. In this life, ḥasrah can be redirected into tawbah. After death, it is permanent.
emotional_disorders.body_manifestation: Chest pain, insomnia, appetite loss, constant mental replay

emotional_disorders.quranic_text: إِنَّ الْإِنْسَانَ خُلِقَ هَلُوعًا ۝ إِذَا مَسَّهُ الشَّرُّ جَزُوعًا ۝ وَإِذَا مَسَّهُ الْخَيْرُ مَنُوعًا / inna al-insāna khuliqa halūʿan idhā massahu al-sharru jazūʿan wa-idhā massahu al-khayru manūʿan / indeed mankind was created anxious — when evil touches him, impatient; when good touches him, withholding
emotional_disorders.description: The هَلُوع syndrome — anxious by nature, impatient in hardship, withholding in ease. This is the DEFAULT human emotional state (Q70:19-21). Exception: المُصَلِّين (those who pray) — Q70:22. Prayer is the ANTIDOTE to the هَلُوع syndrome.
emotional_disorders.body_manifestation: Anxiety about provision, obsessive accumulation, restlessness

healing_protocols.quranic_text: أَلَا بِذِكْرِ اللَّهِ تَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ / a-lā bi-dhikri Allāhi taṭmaʾinnu al-qulūb / indeed, in the remembrance of Allah do hearts find rest
healing_protocols.description: THE primary emotional healing modality. Direct Qur'anic prescription: dhikr → iṭmiʾnān (tranquility). Not metaphorical — MECHANICAL. Also Q33:41: يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا اذْكُرُوا اللَّهَ ذِكْرًا كَثِيرًا (remember Allah with abundant remembrance).
healing_protocols.mechanism: Direct heart soothing — dhikr produces sakīnah

healing_protocols.quranic_text: إِنَّ الصَّلَاةَ تَنْهَىٰ عَنِ الْفَحْشَاءِ وَالْمُنْكَرِ / inna al-ṣalāta tanhā ʿani al-faḥshāʾi wa-l-munkar / indeed prayer prohibits immorality and wrongdoing
healing_protocols.description: Prayer is the IMMUNE SYSTEM of the nafs. It actively PREVENTS (تَنْهَى) faḥshāʾ and munkar. Q70:22-23: the المُصَلِّين (those who pray) are EXEMPT from the هَلُوع syndrome. Physical-spiritual integration: body moves (bow, prostrate) while heart submits.
healing_protocols.mechanism: Triple mechanism: body alignment + heart submission + nafs discipline

healing_protocols.quranic_text: وَنُنَزِّلُ مِنَ الْقُرْآنِ مَا هُوَ شِفَاءٌ وَرَحْمَةٌ لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ / wa-nunazzilu mina al-Qurʾāni mā huwa shifāʾun wa-raḥmatun li-l-muʾminīn / and We send down of the Qur'an that which is healing and mercy for the believers
healing_protocols.description: The Qur'an IS شِفَاء (healing). Not "contains healing" — IS healing. Q10:57: يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ قَدْ جَاءَتْكُمْ مَوْعِظَةٌ مِنْ رَبِّكُمْ وَشِفَاءٌ لِمَا فِي الصُّدُورِ — healing for what is in the breasts. Also Q41:44: healing and guidance.
healing_protocols.mechanism: Sound healing (tajwīd frequencies) + semantic healing (meaning) + spiritual healing (divine speech)

healing_protocols.quranic_text: لَا تَقْنَطُوا مِنْ رَحْمَةِ اللَّهِ إِنَّ اللَّهَ يَغْفِرُ الذُّنُوبَ جَمِيعًا / lā taqnaṭū min raḥmati Allāh inna Allāha yaghfiru al-dhunūba jamīʿan / do not despair of Allah's mercy, indeed Allah forgives all sins
healing_protocols.description: Tawbah is the RESET mechanism for the nafs. Allah is التَّوَّاب (The Oft-Returning). Three conditions: stop the sin, regret, resolve not to return. Q66:8: تَوْبَةً نَصُوحًا (sincere repentance). The Prophet ﷺ: "Allah extends His hand at night for the sinner of the day."
healing_protocols.mechanism: Heart purification — removes rān (rust), reverses hardening

healing_protocols.quranic_text: يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا اسْتَعِينُوا بِالصَّبْرِ وَالصَّلَاةِ / yā ayyuhā alladhīna āmanū istaʿīnū bi-l-ṣabri wa-l-ṣalāh / O you who believe, seek help through patience and prayer
healing_protocols.description: Ṣabr is THREE types: (1) ṣabr ʿalā al-ṭāʿah (patience in obedience), (2) ṣabr ʿan al-maʿṣiyah (patience from sin), (3) ṣabr ʿalā al-balāʾ (patience through trials). All three are emotional strength training. Q39:10: إِنَّمَا يُوَفَّى الصَّابِرُونَ أَجْرَهُمْ بِغَيْرِ حِسَابٍ (the patient will be given reward without measure).
healing_protocols.mechanism: Nafs training — builds endurance against emotional impulse

healing_protocols.quranic_text: وَمَنْ يَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى اللَّهِ فَهُوَ حَسْبُهُ / wa-man yatawakkal ʿalā Allāhi fa-huwa ḥasbuhu / whoever relies on Allah, He is sufficient for him
healing_protocols.description: Tawakkul is the ANTIDOTE to خَوْف (fear) and قَلَق (anxiety). It is NOT passive — it is active trust AFTER taking means. Hadith: "Tie your camel, then rely on Allah." Q3:159: فَإِذَا عَزَمْتَ فَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى اللَّهِ — when you have resolved, rely on Allah.
healing_protocols.mechanism: Anxiety dissolution — transfers burden from self to Allah

healing_protocols.quranic_text: لَئِنْ شَكَرْتُمْ لَأَزِيدَنَّكُمْ / la-in shakartum la-azīdannakum / if you are grateful, I will increase you
healing_protocols.description: Shukr is the EXPANSION protocol — gratitude literally INCREASES blessing. The opposite: وَلَئِنْ كَفَرْتُمْ إِنَّ عَذَابِي لَشَدِيدٌ. Shukr counters bukhl (miserliness), ḥasad (envy), and ṭamaʿ (greed) by redirecting focus from what is LACKING to what is GIVEN.
healing_protocols.mechanism: Perspective shift — from deficit to abundance awareness
healing_protocols.frequency: Morning and evening + after each blessing

healing_protocols.quranic_text: ادْعُونِي أَسْتَجِبْ لَكُمْ / udʿūnī astajib lakum / call upon Me, I will respond to you
healing_protocols.description: Du'ā is the DIRECT LINE to Allah. Q2:186: وَإِذَا سَأَلَكَ عِبَادِي عَنِّي فَإِنِّي قَرِيبٌ أُجِيبُ دَعْوَةَ الدَّاعِ — when My servants ask about Me, I am NEAR, I respond. Du'ā is itself ʿibādah (worship). The act of asking transforms the emotional state — it acknowledges dependency on Allah.
healing_protocols.mechanism: Direct divine connection — acknowledges dependency, receives response
healing_protocols.frequency: Unlimited — especially in prostration and last third of night

healing_protocols.quranic_text: اسْتَغْفِرُوا رَبَّكُمْ إِنَّهُ كَانَ غَفَّارًا ۝ يُرْسِلِ السَّمَاءَ عَلَيْكُمْ مِدْرَارًا / istaghfirū rabbakum innahu kāna ghaffāran yursili al-samāʾa ʿalaykum midrāran / seek forgiveness of your Lord, indeed He is Forgiving — He will send rain upon you in abundance
healing_protocols.description: Istighfār has MATERIAL effects — rain, wealth, children, gardens (Q71:10-12). Nūḥ عليه السلام prescribed istighfār for economic hardship. The Prophet ﷺ: "Whoever makes istighfār constant, Allah will make for him a way out of every difficulty." It is the detox protocol for accumulated sin (removes rān, Q83:14).
healing_protocols.mechanism: Sin-rust removal — cleans the rān from the heart

healing_protocols.quranic_text: الَّذِينَ يَذْكُرُونَ اللَّهَ قِيَامًا وَقُعُودًا وَعَلَىٰ جُنُوبِهِمْ وَيَتَفَكَّرُونَ فِي خَلْقِ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ / alladhīna yadhkurūna Allāha qiyāman wa-quʿūdan... wa-yatafakkarūna fī khalqi al-samāwāti wa-l-arḍ / those who remember Allah standing, sitting, and lying on their sides, and reflect upon the creation of heavens and earth
healing_protocols.description: Tafakkur is ACTIVE contemplation — not passive meditation. The أُولُو الْأَلْبَاب combine dhikr WITH tafakkur. They reflect on CREATION to reach the Creator. Hadith: "An hour of tafakkur is better than a year of (mechanical) worship." It activates the لُبّ (core intellect).
healing_protocols.mechanism: Lubb activation — wakes the deep intellect from ghaflah
healing_protocols.frequency: Daily — especially in nature and before sleep

healing_protocols.quranic_text: كُتِبَ عَلَيْكُمُ الصِّيَامُ كَمَا كُتِبَ عَلَى الَّذِينَ مِنْ قَبْلِكُمْ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَتَّقُونَ / kutiba ʿalaykumu al-ṣiyāmu kamā kutiba ʿalā alladhīna min qablikum laʿallakum tattaqūn / fasting is prescribed for you as it was for those before you, that you may attain taqwā
healing_protocols.description: Fasting trains the nafs in DISCIPLINE. Its stated purpose: لَعَلَّكُمْ تَتَّقُونَ (that you may attain taqwā). It breaks the nafs al-ammārah's grip on desire. Physical hunger trains spiritual hunger-management. The Prophet ﷺ prescribed fasting for young people struggling with desire.
healing_protocols.mechanism: Nafs discipline — breaks the ammārah cycle through controlled deprivation

healing_protocols.quranic_text: مَثَلُ الَّذِينَ يُنْفِقُونَ أَمْوَالَهُمْ فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ كَمَثَلِ حَبَّةٍ أَنْبَتَتْ سَبْعَ سَنَابِلَ / mathalu alladhīna yunfiqūna amwālahum fī sabīli Allāhi ka-mathali ḥabbatin anbatat sabʿa sanābil / the example of those who spend in the way of Allah is like a seed that grows seven ears
healing_protocols.description: Ṣadaqah is the ANTIDOTE to bukhl (miserliness) and ḥasad (envy). It purifies wealth: خُذْ مِنْ أَمْوَالِهِمْ صَدَقَةً تُطَهِّرُهُمْ وَتُزَكِّيهِمْ بِهَا (Q9:103). Note: تُطَهِّرُ (purifies) + تُزَكِّي (makes grow). Dual function: cleansing AND growth.
healing_protocols.mechanism: Heart purification through giving — breaks attachment to wealth

healing_protocols.quranic_text: يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا اتَّقُوا اللَّهَ وَلْتَنْظُرْ نَفْسٌ مَا قَدَّمَتْ لِغَدٍ / yā ayyuhā alladhīna āmanū ittaqū Allāha wa-l-tanẓur nafsun mā qaddamat li-ghad / O you who believe, fear Allah, and let every soul look at what it has prepared for tomorrow
healing_protocols.description: Muḥāsabah — self-accounting before the final Account. ʿUmar رضي الله عنه: "Account yourselves before you are accounted for." Daily review: what did I do today? What did I intend? Where did the nafs deviate? This is the نَفْسُ اللَّوَّامَة in action (Q75:2).
healing_protocols.mechanism: Self-audit mechanism — maintains awareness, prevents ghaflah accumulation

healing_protocols.quranic_text: قَدْ أَفْلَحَ مَنْ زَكَّاهَا / qad aflaḥa man zakkāhā / indeed he succeeds who purifies it
healing_protocols.description: تَزْكِيَة is the COMPREHENSIVE healing — the entire nafs purification program. Q91:9-10: success = purification, failure = corruption. This is WHY prophets were sent: يُزَكِّيهِمْ (Q62:2). Tazkiyah is not a single act — it is the TOTAL protocol: dhikr + ṣalāh + tilāwah + tawbah + ṣabr + shukr + ṣadaqah combined.
healing_protocols.mechanism: Comprehensive nafs overhaul — the complete healing program

healing_protocols.quranic_text: وَعِبَادُ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الَّذِينَ يَمْشُونَ عَلَى الْأَرْضِ هَوْنًا / wa-ʿibādu al-Raḥmāni alladhīna yamshūna ʿalā al-arḍi hawnan / the servants of the Most Merciful walk upon the earth humbly
healing_protocols.description: Tawāḍuʿ is the ANTIDOTE to كِبْر and عُجْب. The Prophet ﷺ: "Whoever humbles himself for Allah, Allah will raise him." Physical manifestation: walking gently (هَوْنًا), lowering the wing (Q15:88: وَاخْفِضْ جَنَاحَكَ لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ). Humility is strength, not weakness.
healing_protocols.mechanism: Kibr dissolution — actively counters arrogance through practice

social_health.quranic_text: يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا إِنْ جَاءَكُمْ فَاسِقٌ بِنَبَإٍ فَتَبَيَّنُوا
social_health.description: Verification before action (tabayyanun) is the foundation of social health. Q49:6 commands: if a fasiq brings news, verify it (fa-tabayyanu). Acting on unverified information causes communal harm - relationships destroyed, reputations ruined, wars started. The violation is hasty judgment without evidence. Mechanism: rumour propagation damages collective trust, which is the immune system of the ummah. Modern contamination: social media amplifies unverified claims at scale, replacing tabayyanun with instant reaction.
social_health.emotional_impact: Anxiety from rumors, false accusations, community division
social_health.remedy: Verify through trusted chains; withhold judgment

social_health.quranic_text: إِنَّمَا الْمُؤْمِنُونَ إِخْوَةٌ فَأَصْلِحُوا بَيْنَ أَخَوَيْكُمْ
social_health.description: Reconciliation between believers (islah) is obligatory, not optional. Q49:10 innama al-muminun ikhwah fa-aslihu bayna akhawaykum - believers are brothers, so reconcile. The violation is allowing rift to fester. Unresolved conflict between two Muslims is a disease that spreads to the community body - like untreated infection in one limb spreading systemically. Mechanism: broken relationship severs communal bonds, creates factions (ahzab), weakens collective defence. The reconciler (muslih) performs spiritual surgery.
social_health.emotional_impact: Chronic stress from unresolved conflict, bitterness
social_health.remedy: Active reconciliation: listen, seek justice Q49:9, restore brotherhood

social_health.quranic_text: لَا يَسْخَرْ قَوْمٌ مِنْ قَوْمٍ عَسَىٰ أَنْ يَكُونُوا خَيْرًا مِنْهُمْ
social_health.description: Mockery (sukhriyyah) is prohibited because it inverts the divine hierarchy. Q49:11 la yaskhar qawmun min qawm - perhaps the mocked are better with Allah. The mocker assumes superiority (kibr), which is the root disease of Iblis (Q2:34). Mockery externalizes internal arrogance and infects the target with huzn (grief), khawf (fear of social rejection), and potentially yas (despair). It is simultaneously a symptom of the mockers disease and a cause of the victims disease. Double harm, single act.
social_health.emotional_impact: Humiliation in mocked, arrogance in mocker

social_health.quranic_text: وَلَا تَلْمِزُوا أَنْفُسَكُمْ وَلَا تَنَابَزُوا بِالْأَلْقَابِ
social_health.description: Self-defamation (lamz) means attacking your own community, because believers are one body. Q49:11 wa-la talmizu anfusakum - do not defame yourselves. The Arabic uses anfusakum (yourselves), not ikhwanakum (your brothers), because harming another believer IS harming yourself. This is the Quranic basis for communal nervous system theory: pain in one limb registers in all. Defamation (lamz) is the social expression of hasad (envy) - the defamer cannot tolerate anothers virtue, so attacks it publicly.
social_health.remedy: Use good names; correct harmful labels

social_health.quranic_text: اجْتَنِبُوا كَثِيرًا مِنَ الظَّنِّ إِنَّ بَعْضَ الظَّنِّ إِثْمٌ
social_health.description: Suspicion (zann) is identified as sin itself. Q49:12 ijtanibu kathiran min al-zann inna bada al-zann ithm - avoid much suspicion, for some suspicion IS sin. Not merely leads to sin, but IS sin. The mechanism: suspicion corrupts the qalb internally before any external act occurs. It is a disease of perception - the suspicious heart sees evil in every action, projects its own corruption outward. This poisons all relationships preemptively. Contaminated Western form: paranoia (pathologized), when the actual framework is spiritual corruption of perception.
social_health.emotional_impact: Paranoia, social isolation, inability to trust

social_health.english: Do not spy on one another
social_health.description: Spying (tajassus) violates the sanctity of what Allah has concealed. Q49:12 wa-la tajassasu. If Allah has covered a persons flaw, the spy who uncovers it fights against divine mercy (sitr). Mechanism: spying destroys the social fabric of trust. When people know they are watched, they perform (riya) rather than live authentically. The community shifts from genuine taqwa to performance anxiety. Every surveillance state recreates the tajassus violation at industrial scale.
social_health.emotional_impact: Betrayal trauma, obsessive behavior, trust destruction

social_health.quranic_text: أَيُحِبُّ أَحَدُكُمْ أَنْ يَأْكُلَ لَحْمَ أَخِيهِ مَيْتًا
social_health.description: Backbiting (ghibah) is equated with eating the flesh of your dead brother. Q49:12 a-yuhibbu ahadukum an yakula lahma akhihi maytan fa-karihtumuh. The Quranic imagery is deliberately visceral: the victim is absent (dead, unable to defend), and the backbiter consumes their reputation like carrion. Mechanism: ghibah destroys the social immune system. Once backbiting is normalized in a community, no ones honour is safe, trust collapses, and the community body enters autoimmune failure - attacking its own members.
social_health.emotional_impact: Reputation destruction, trust collapse, guilt in backbiter

social_health.description: Equality before Allah based on taqwa alone. Q49:13 inna akramakum inda Allah atqakum - the most noble among you is the most righteous. This demolishes every hierarchy based on race, tribe, wealth, lineage, or status. The violation is any social system that ranks humans by anything other than taqwa. Mechanism: false hierarchy (based on Source 3 operator categories) creates kibr in the elevated and huzn/yas in the suppressed. The Quranic prescription restores the natural order: only consciousness of Allah determines rank.

The slanderer/backbiter (humazah) is given an entire surah of warning. Q104:1 waylun li-kulli humazatin lumazah. Humazah operates through facial expression and gesture (non-verbal mockery), while lumazah operates through speech. Together they form the complete arsenal of social destruction. The humazah hoards wealth (Q104:2-3) thinking it makes them immortal - revealing that social aggression and material greed are the same disease: kibr expressed through different channels.
social_health.remedy: Recognize speech as action with consequences

social_health.description: Exalted character (khuluq azim) is the pinnacle of social health - attributed to the Prophet (salla Allahu alayhi wa-sallam) in Q68:4. This is not merely good behaviour but the complete integration of all social health principles into a single personality. The person of khuluq azim has passed through all nafs levels to al-kamilah, embodies every healing protocol, and naturally prevents every social violation. It is the social equivalent of complete physical health - every system functioning in harmony.

Justice (adl) in Q49:9 commands equitable resolution when two groups of believers fight. Adl is not neutrality - it requires actively determining who transgressed and correcting the transgression. The violation is false equivalence (treating aggressor and victim equally) or partisan bias (siding with ones faction regardless of truth). Mechanism: injustice in dispute resolution teaches the community that truth does not matter, which breeds yas (despair in divine order) and normalizes zulm.
social_health.remedy: Apply justice even against self Q4:135

social_health.quranic_text: وَعِبَادُ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الَّذِينَ يَمْشُونَ عَلَى الْأَرْضِ هَوْنًا
social_health.description: Walking gently (hawnan) on earth from Q25:63. Ibad al-Rahman walk with humility - this is not weakness but calibrated force. The violation is stomping, demanding, imposing presence through aggression. Mechanism: gentle movement through social space allows others room to exist, prevents triggering defensive responses, and models tawadu (humility). Physiologically linked to H1 body_movement_chains: prayer teaches calibrated movement, which extends to all social interaction.

social_health.english: When addressed by ignorant, say peace
social_health.description: Peace response (qalu salaman) from Q25:63 - when addressed by the ignorant, the servants of al-Rahman say salam. This is the ultimate anger circuit-breaker. The violation is reciprocating aggression, which escalates conflict. Mechanism: responding to provocation with peace (salam) breaks the ghadab (anger) cycle in BOTH parties. The provocateur expected resistance and is disarmed. The responder maintains qalb salim by refusing to let external chaos enter the sadr. Q41:34 confirms: repel evil with what is better.

nafs_cross_refs.notes: al-fuad (inner heart) treated by tafakkur (contemplation) - Q53:11 + Q3:191
al-fuad when corrupted manifests as ghaflah (heedlessness) - perception organ fails
al-fuad responds to Quranic recitation - tilawah penetrates to deepest perception layer
al-lubb (core intellect) treated by tafakkur - Q3:190 la-ayatin li-uli al-albab
al-lubb when blocked manifests as kibr (arrogance) - reason overridden Q40:56
al-ruh (spirit) treated by dhikr Allah - Q15:29 nafakhtu fihi min ruhi + Q13:28
al-ruh when severed from dhikr manifests as yas (despair) - Q39:53
ghulf (wrapped hearts Q2:88) manifests as ghaflah (heedlessness Q7:179)
ghulf treated by tilawat al-Quran - Q17:82 shifaa
qalbun salim (Q26:89) maintained by tazkiyah - Q91:9 qad aflaha man zakkaha
qalbun salim sustained by shukr (gratitude) - Q14:7
qalbun munib (penitent Q50:33) maintained by tawbah - both involve turning to Allah
qalbun wajil (awed Q23:60) - healthy fear boundary with pathological khawf
qalbun wajil calmed by dhikr - Q13:28 bi-dhikri Allah tatmainnu al-qulub
taqallub (fluctuation Q24:37) stabilized by tawakkul - Q65:3
taqallub when uncontrolled manifests as khawf/anxiety - heart oscillates without anchor
rabt al-qalb (binding Q28:10) achieved through sabr - Allah binds patient hearts
rabt (binding) = structural concept - heart bound as body bound by ligaments/fascia
yas (despair Q39:53) treated by tawbah - la taqnatu min rahmat Allah
yas treated by istighfar - Q71:10-12 istaghfiru rabbakum yursil al-samaa
ujb (vanity Q9:25) treated by tawadu (humility) - Q25:63 yamshun hawnan
ujb treated by muhasabah (self-reckoning) - Q59:18 wa-l-tanzur nafsun
hasrah (regret Q39:56) treated by tawbah - turning regret into repentance
hasrah treated by sabr - Q2:153 - patience transforms regret
tama (greed Q70:19-21) treated by sadaqah - giving breaks accumulation grip
tama treated by shukr (gratitude Q14:7) - contentment dissolves greed
dua (supplication Q40:60) treats yas - direct call to Allah breaks despair
dua treats khawf - Q40:60 uduni astajib lakum - supplication replaces fear
sadaqah (charity Q2:261) treats bukhl - giving is antidote to withholding
la talmizu anfusakum (Q49:11) blocks hasad - defamation is externalized envy
khuluqin azim (Q68:4) = product of tazkiyah - great character from purified nafs
khuluqin azim = outward expression of al-nafs al-kamilah (perfected self)
qalu salaman (Q25:63) blocks ghadab - responding with peace extinguishes anger

sensory_architecture.quranic_text: إِنَّ السَّمْعَ وَالْبَصَرَ وَالْفُؤَادَ كُلُّ أُولَٰئِكَ كَانَ عَنْهُ مَسْئُولًا
sensory_architecture.function: Reception of sound waves; first sense created, last to die; always active (no ear-lids)
sensory_architecture.description: Hearing is ALWAYS listed FIRST before sight in the Quran (Q2:7, Q6:46, Q16:78, Q17:36, Q23:78, Q32:9, Q46:26, Q67:23). This is medical: hearing develops in utero before sight (week 18 vs week 26), hearing is the last sense to fail at death, and hearing has no voluntary off-switch. Allah made hearing the PRIMARY input channel. The ear converts air pressure waves into neural signals.
sensory_architecture.f_gate: PASS: auditory function measurable via audiometry, ABR, OAE testing

sensory_architecture.function: Reception and processing of light (nur); voluntary (can close eyes); dominant info channel
sensory_architecture.description: Sight is ALWAYS listed SECOND after hearing in the Quran. Q24:30-31 commands lowering the gaze (ghadd al-basar) the ONLY sense given a specific behavioral command. The eye receives nur (Q24:35) and converts photons to neural signals. Ibn al-Haytham (SC04) proved light enters the eye (not emitted), correcting the Greek error. Q67:3-4 prescribes repeated looking as diagnostic method.
sensory_architecture.f_gate: PASS: visual acuity, field, colour perception all measurable via ophthalmological testing

sensory_architecture.function: Reception of dissolved chemical stimuli; gateway to digestion; quality control for sustenance
sensory_architecture.accountability: Implied accountability - taste mediates halal/haram food selection
sensory_architecture.description: Taste (dhawq) appears 58 times in the Quran, predominantly as metaphor for EXPERIENCING consequences: dhawq al-adhab (Q3:106, Q6:30, Q8:35). Taste is the MOST INTIMATE sense - you take the substance INTO yourself. 5 modalities (sweet, sour, salty, bitter, umami) correspond to 5 nutritional categories. Tongue is both INPUT (taste) and OUTPUT (speech) - dual function.
sensory_architecture.f_gate: PASS: taste threshold measurable via gustometry; taste-bud density quantifiable

sensory_architecture.function: Reception of airborne chemical molecules; linked to memory and emotion; involuntary (breathe=smell)
sensory_architecture.accountability: Yaqub detected Yusuf scent (Q12:94) - smell carries identity and truth
sensory_architecture.description: Smell is the LEAST mentioned external sense but carries extraordinary weight. Yaqub (alayhi al-salam) detected rih (scent/spirit) of Yusuf from a great distance (Q12:94) - a prophetic sensory miracle. Smell is involuntary (linked to breathing), bypasses conscious filtering (direct to limbic system), and is the strongest memory trigger. Rih means both wind and scent - atmosphere connects to perception. Musk (misk) = scent of Jannah.
sensory_architecture.f_gate: PASS: olfactory threshold measurable via olfactometry; anosmia clinically diagnosable

sensory_architecture.quranic_text: وَلَوْ نَزَّلْنَا عَلَيْكَ كِتَابًا فِي قِرْطَاسٍ فَلَمَسُوهُ بِأَيْدِيهِمْ
sensory_architecture.function: Reception of pressure, temperature, pain; distributed across entire body surface
sensory_architecture.accountability: Q41:20-22 - skin (julud) TESTIFIES on Day of Judgment
sensory_architecture.description: Touch is the most distributed sense - the entire skin (julud) is a sensory organ. Q41:20-22: hearing, sight, AND SKIN testify. Skin promoted to WITNESS status. Q6:7 describes disbelievers touching a physical book yet still denying. Touch includes pain (nociception) - the body alarm system. Q4:56: burned skin replaced so punishment continues - skin integrity = sensory continuity.
sensory_architecture.f_gate: PASS: tactile sensitivity measurable via monofilament testing, two-point discrimination

sensory_architecture.function: Integrates all sensory input into meaning; the perception behind perception
sensory_architecture.description: The fuʼad is the THIRD accountable faculty in Q17:36 - listed after sam and basar because it PROCESSES what they receive. Q53:11 ma kadhaba al-fuʼad ma raa (the fuʼad did not lie about what it saw) - truth detector. Sits deeper than qalb in the nafs architecture (H4 NA10). When external senses deliver data, the fuʼad determines meaning.
sensory_architecture.f_gate: PASS: integration function testable via cognitive assessment; cross-modal perception measurable

sensory_architecture.function: Processes sensory data through logic; literally to BIND - reason binds raw perception to meaning
sensory_architecture.accountability: Repeatedly invoked: a-fa-la taqilun Q2:44, Q3:65, Q6:32, Q21:10, Q23:80
sensory_architecture.description: Aql appears 49 times in the Quran, always as a VERB (yaqilun) never a noun - reason is ACTION not possession. Root ayn-qaf-lam means to bind/hobble. Rational intellect BINDS raw sensory data to conclusions. The Quran repeatedly asks a-fa-la taqilun (will you not reason?) - sensory data available but binding it to truth requires effort.
sensory_architecture.f_gate: PASS: rational function testable via logical reasoning assessments

sensory_architecture.quranic_text: قُلْ هَٰذِهِ سَبِيلِي أَدْعُو إِلَى اللَّهِ ۚ عَلَىٰ بَصِيرَةٍ
sensory_architecture.function: Sees truth beyond physical appearance; the sight of the qalb; activated by taqwa
sensory_architecture.accountability: Q12:108 - call to Allah ala basirah (upon insight/clear evidence)
sensory_architecture.description: Baṣīrah is from same root as baṣar (b-ṣ-r) but represents INNER sight. Q12:108: I call to Allah ala baṣīrah. Physical baṣar sees surfaces; baṣīrah sees reality. Q6:104: baṣāʼir (spiritual insights) from your Lord. Baṣīrah is the HIGHEST perceptual faculty - activated through taqwa, sees what physical eyes cannot. The blind (ama) of Q2:18 are those whose baṣīrah is dead while baṣar functions.
sensory_architecture.f_gate: PASS: spiritual insight correlates with behavioral consistency - measurable via moral-action alignment

perception_hierarchy.quranic_text: وَاللَّهُ أَخْرَجَكُم مِّن بُطُونِ أُمَّهَاتِكُمْ لَا تَعْلَمُونَ شَيْئًا وَجَعَلَ لَكُمُ السَّمْعَ وَالْأَبْصَارَ وَالْأَفْئِدَةَ
perception_hierarchy.evidence: Sam (singular) precedes absar (plural) in every Quranic instance
perception_hierarchy.description: Q16:78: Allah brought you knowing nothing and made for you hearing (singular), sight (plural), and hearts. Singular sam vs plural absar: hearing is ONE unified field, sight is MULTIPLE (binocular). This ordering in Q23:78, Q32:9, Q46:26, Q67:23 - never reversed. Embryological: cochlea functional week 18, retina week 26.
perception_hierarchy.f_gate: PASS: embryological development timeline verifiable via prenatal imaging

perception_hierarchy.description: Triad sam-basar-fuad in Q16:78, Q23:78, Q32:9, Q46:26, Q67:23. Not a list but a PIPELINE. Hearing receives raw signal (passive, always on). Sight processes visual field (active, voluntary). Fuad integrates all into understanding. Each stage depends on the previous. Q46:26 warns even with all three, they availed nothing - pipeline intact yet output rejected through kufr.
perception_hierarchy.f_gate: PASS: sensory processing pipeline verifiable via neuroimaging (auditory->visual->prefrontal cortex)

perception_hierarchy.quranic_text: خَتَمَ اللَّهُ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِمْ وَعَلَىٰ سَمْعِهِمْ ۖ وَعَلَىٰ أَبْصَارِهِمْ غِشَاوَةٌ
perception_hierarchy.evidence: Qalb sealed FIRST, then sam, then basar covered - corruption is inside-out
perception_hierarchy.description: Q2:7: Allah sealed hearts AND hearing, over sight is a ghishawah (covering, not seal). Sealing order: qalb first (internal), sam second (hearing truth rejected), basar gets covering (not sealed, just veiled). Sight is LAST corrupted and EASIEST to restore. Treatment: remove ghishawah from sight first, unseal hearing, then heal qalb. Reverse engineering of Q2:7.
perception_hierarchy.f_gate: PASS: corruption sequence testable - cognitive bias distorts hearing before sight

perception_hierarchy.quranic_text: شَهِدَ عَلَيْهِمْ سَمْعُهُمْ وَأَبْصَارُهُمْ وَجُلُودُهُمْ بِمَا كَانُوا يَعْمَلُونَ
perception_hierarchy.evidence: Hearing + sight + skin testify WITH SPECIFICS about actions
perception_hierarchy.description: Q41:20: hearing, sight, and skin testify about what they used to do. Three senses become witnesses - they RECORD everything. The body is an active recording system. Every sound heard, image seen, touch felt is stored. Q41:21: they say to skin, why testify? Skin replies: Allah who gave speech to everything made us speak. Senses are independent witnesses - cannot be silenced by the nafs.

perception_hierarchy.quranic_text: وَاغْضُضْ مِن صَوْتِكَ ۚ إِنَّ أَنكَرَ الْأَصْوَاتِ لَصَوْتُ الْحَمِيرِ

sensory_disorders.quranic_text: صُمٌّ بُكْمٌ عُمْيٌ فَهُمْ لَا يَرْجِعُونَ

sensory_disorders.western_equivalent: Sensorineural hearing loss, auditory processing disorder
sensory_disorders.spiritual_physical: BOTH: spiritual deafness manifests as inability to hear guidance; physical samam blocks all sound
sensory_disorders.description: Q2:18 places samam FIRST in the triad (deaf-mute-blind) because hearing loss initiates the cascade. 8 Quranic occurrences. The samm person receives sound waves but cannot extract MEANING. In spiritual terms: Quran recited, adhan called, truth spoken — all reach the ear but produce zero response. Physical correlate: auditory processing disorder (sound reaches cochlea but cortex cannot decode it).

sensory_disorders.quranic_text: وَجَعَلْنَا عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِمْ أَكِنَّةً أَن يَفْقَهُوهُ وَفِي آذَانِهِمْ وَقْرًا

Contaminated equivalent: tinnitus (persistent noise drowning out signal). The mechanism: inner waqr makes external truth sound like noise.
sensory_disorders.f_gate: PASS: auditory loading measurable via audiometric masking tests

sensory_disorders.quranic_text: فَإِنَّهَا لَا تَعْمَى الْأَبْصَارُ وَلَٰكِن تَعْمَى الْقُلُوبُ الَّتِي فِي الصُّدُورِ

This is why sight is the most recoverable sense. The ghishawah filters what enters — the person sees the world through a distorted lens. Everything is visible but nothing appears as it truly is. This explains why some people resist truth despite overwhelming evidence — the akinnah are too thick.

sensory_disorders.quranic_text: كَلَّا ۖ بَلْ ۜ رَانَ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِمْ مَّا كَانُوا يَكْسِبُونَ

sensory_disorders.quranic_text: أُولَٰئِكَ الَّذِينَ طَبَعَ اللَّهُ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِمْ وَاتَّبَعُوا أَهْوَاءَهُمْ

This is the most dangerous disorder because the person APPEARS rational. Physical parallel: confirmation bias (functional cognition that systematically ignores disconfirming evidence).

sensory_diagnostics.english: Do they hear you when you call?
sensory_diagnostics.method: Auditory response test: call → observe response
sensory_diagnostics.expected_response: Healthy: immediate orientation to sound source; Diseased: no response or delayed response
sensory_diagnostics.description: Ibrahim (alayhi al-salam) diagnostic method (Q26:72): do your idols hear you when you call? The diagnostic principle: if a stimulus produces no response, the receiver is dead. Applied to human hearing: call the person to truth. Immediate response = sam intact. Delayed/none = sam compromised. This is auditory response testing — the same principle used in newborn hearing screening.
sensory_diagnostics.f_gate: PASS: auditory response testing is standard clinical practice (ABR, OAE)

sensory_diagnostics.quranic_text: فَارْجِعِ الْبَصَرَ هَلْ تَرَىٰ مِن فُطُورٍ ۝ ثُمَّ ارْجِعِ الْبَصَرَ كَرَّتَيْنِ
