sensory_diagnostics.expected_response: Healthy: basar returns khasian (humbled/exhausted) finding no flaw; Diseased: cannot sustain focused looking
sensory_diagnostics.description: Q67:3-4 prescribes a DIAGNOSTIC PROTOCOL for sight: look at creation. See any flaw? Look AGAIN (karratayn = twice more). Your sight will return humbled and exhausted finding nothing. This is the method of scientific observation: repeated examination under different conditions. If the observer cannot sustain repeated looking, their basar is weak. Applied to spiritual sight: examine creation repeatedly — if you see no design, your basirah is dead.
sensory_diagnostics.f_gate: PASS: sustained visual attention measurable; visual search performance quantifiable

sensory_diagnostics.method: Rational processing test: present evidence → observe if aql engages
sensory_diagnostics.expected_response: Healthy: evidence produces reasoning, questioning, conclusion; Diseased: evidence ignored or rationalized away
sensory_diagnostics.description: The Quran asks a-fa-la yaqilun 13 times (Q2:44, Q3:65, Q6:32, Q7:169, Q10:16, Q11:51, Q12:109, Q21:10, Q21:67, Q23:80, Q28:60, Q36:68, Q37:138). Each instance follows AFTER presenting evidence. This is a perception test: evidence presented → does the aql engage? If yes, sam+basar+fuad pipeline is working. If no, the pipeline has a blockage. Location of blockage determined by which questions the person CAN answer (physical) vs cannot (spiritual).
sensory_diagnostics.f_gate: PASS: rational engagement measurable via response to logical arguments and evidence

sensory_diagnostics.method: Fuad truth-detection test: does inner perception confirm what was seen?
sensory_diagnostics.expected_response: Healthy: fuad validates external perception — no internal contradiction; Diseased: fuad contradicts or doubts valid perception
sensory_diagnostics.description: Q53:11: The fuad did not lie about what it (he) saw. The Prophet (salla Allahu alayhi wa-sallam) SAW Jibril and his fuad CONFIRMED it was real. This is the fuad diagnostic: when confronted with truth, does the inner perception agree or rebel? A healthy fuad says yes to truth without internal conflict. A diseased fuad generates doubt about what the external senses correctly perceived — the person sees evidence and STILL doubts. Cognitive dissonance = fuad disease.
sensory_diagnostics.f_gate: PASS: cognitive dissonance measurable via behavioral and physiological indicators

sensory_diagnostics.english: Let man look at his food
sensory_diagnostics.method: Nutritional awareness test: does the person examine what enters the body?
sensory_diagnostics.expected_response: Healthy: conscious food selection, aware of source and quality; Diseased: mindless consumption without examination
sensory_diagnostics.description: Q80:24 commands: let man LOOK at his food. This is a taste/nutrition diagnostic — not just what the tongue detects but whether the person EXAMINES what they consume. The verb yandhur (look/examine) is used, not yadhaq (taste). Diagnosis: a person who eats without examination has dead dhawq — the quality-control function is disabled. Applied to information diet: do you examine what enters your mind as carefully as what enters your body?
sensory_diagnostics.f_gate: PASS: dietary awareness assessable; mindful eating correlates with health outcomes

sensory_diagnostics.arabic: أَفَلَا يَنظُرُونَ إِلَى الْإِبِلِ كَيْفَ خُلِقَتْ
sensory_diagnostics.english: Do they not look at the camel
sensory_diagnostics.quranic_text: أَفَلَا يَنظُرُونَ إِلَى الْإِبِلِ كَيْفَ خُلِقَتْ وَإِلَى السَّمَاءِ كَيْفَ رُفِعَتْ

sensory_diagnostics.expected_response: Healthy: observation produces wonder (tafakkur); Diseased: sees creation but produces no response
sensory_diagnostics.description: Q88:17-20: Do they not look at the camel (how created), the sky (how raised), the mountains (how set), the earth (how spread)? Four sensory targets requiring MULTIPLE senses — looking (basar), feeling terrain (lams), hearing wind (sam). This is a comprehensive environmental perception test. The healthy response: tafakkur leading to tawhid. Diseased response: sees all four and feels nothing. Diagnostic protocol: take patient into nature, observe response.
sensory_diagnostics.f_gate: PASS: nature-exposure response measurable via cortisol reduction, attention restoration

sensory_diagnostics.method: Olfactory sensitivity test: can the person detect subtle meaningful scents?
sensory_diagnostics.expected_response: Healthy: detects rih (scent/spirit) beyond surface; Diseased: only registers strong obvious smells
sensory_diagnostics.description: Q12:94: Yaqub said inni la-ajidu (I surely find/detect) the rih of Yusuf. The diagnostic is: how SUBTLE a signal can the person detect? Prophetic level = detecting identity across vast distance. Normal healthy = detecting freshness, spoilage, danger in food/environment. Diseased = anosmia or inability to distinguish meaningful scents. Applied spiritually: can the person detect the rih (spirit/scent) of truth vs falsehood in a situation? Some people smell corruption immediately; others are oblivious.
sensory_diagnostics.f_gate: PASS: olfactory sensitivity measurable via standardized smell identification tests

sensory_diagnostics.arabic: يَوْمَ تَشْهَدُ عَلَيْهِمْ أَلْسِنَتُهُمْ وَأَيْدِيهِمْ وَأَرْجُلُهُمْ
sensory_diagnostics.quranic_text: يَوْمَ تَشْهَدُ عَلَيْهِمْ أَلْسِنَتُهُمْ وَأَيْدِيهِمْ وَأَرْجُلُهُمْ
sensory_diagnostics.method: Somatic testimony test: does the body reveal what the person conceals?
sensory_diagnostics.expected_response: Healthy: body and speech aligned (no contradiction); Diseased: body betrays through symptoms what mouth denies
sensory_diagnostics.description: Q24:24: Their tongues, hands, and feet will testify about what they used to do. The body records everything and eventually SPEAKS. Diagnostic: observe the body while the patient speaks — do hands tremble? Do feet shift? Does skin flush? Body language is involuntary testimony. A person may deny pain/fear/guilt verbally but the skin, hands, and feet TESTIFY the truth. This is the basis of psychosomatic assessment: the body never lies.

perception_contamination.quranic_text: يُوحِي بَعْضُهُمْ إِلَىٰ بَعْضٍ زُخْرُفَ الْقَوْلِ غُرُورًا

Modern mechanism: screens deliver 60fps high-resolution zukhruf directly to the retina — bypassing sam (no sound needed), bypassing aql (emotional response before rational processing). Average person sees 6,000-10,000 advertisements per day. Each one is zukhruf designed to override basirah.

A person who cannot sit in silence for 5 minutes has compromised sam.

perception_contamination.quranic_text: لَا تُحَرِّمُوا طَيِّبَاتِ مَا أَحَلَّ اللَّهُ لَكُمْ

perception_contamination.modern_mechanism: Ultra-processed food, artificial sweeteners, MSG, flavour engineering, sugar addiction

perception_contamination.description: Q5:87: Do not prohibit the tayyibat (good things) Allah permitted. The contamination operates in BOTH directions: (1) tayyibat are made to taste bad or boring (organic food marketed as expensive/niche), (2) harmful substances are made to taste irresistible (sugar engineering, flavour labs). Result: the persons dhawq is recalibrated so that halal-tayyib tastes bland and haram tastes delicious. The tongue now guides TOWARD harm and AWAY from health.

Synthetic fragrance industry ($50B) systematically replaces natural olfactory intelligence with artificial signals. A person in synthetic fragrance cannot detect the rih (spirit/scent) of their environment — the Yaqub capacity (Q12:94) is disabled.

perception_contamination.quranic_text: وَجَعَلَ لَكُم مِّن جُلُودِ الْأَنْعَامِ بُيُوتًا

perception_contamination.modern_mechanism: Climate control (constant temperature), synthetic fabrics, ergonomic everything, touch-screen replacing physical interaction
perception_contamination.description: Q16:80: Allah made for you from animal skins dwellings. Natural tactile environment: varied temperatures, rough surfaces, wind, rain, earth contact. Contamination: climate-controlled interiors (constant 22C), synthetic surfaces, shoes blocking earth contact, chairs replacing floor-sitting. Result: skin mechanoreceptors under-stimulated, proprioception weakened. The body loses its ability to feel environmental signals. Grounding (barefoot earth contact) is eliminated.
perception_contamination.f_gate: PASS: tactile sensitivity decline in sedentary populations documented; grounding effects measurable

perception_contamination.modern_mechanism: Social media ego amplification, individualism ideology, self-help narcissism, fame culture
perception_contamination.detection_pattern: DP09 (STATUS INVERSION) — the self is elevated above truth
perception_contamination.description: Q25:21: Those who do not expect to meet Us say: why are angels not sent down? They have become arrogant (istakbaru) in themselves. Kibr is the PRIMARY fuad contaminant — it places the SELF above truth. When the fuad encounters information that contradicts the ego, kibr blocks integration. Modern mechanism: social media creates quantified self-importance (followers, likes). Self-help industry teaches self-first philosophy. Result: fuad calibrated to serve ego, not truth.
perception_contamination.f_gate: PASS: narcissism scales measure self-elevation; social media impact on self-perception documented

perception_contamination.quranic_text: فَلَمَّا أَلْقَوْا سَحَرُوا أَعْيُنَ النَّاسِ وَاسْتَرْهَبُوهُمْ
perception_contamination.attack_vector: Rational hijack: sophisticated deception that overrides logical processing
perception_contamination.modern_mechanism: Propaganda, gaslighting, controlled opposition, academic gatekeeping, manufactured consensus
perception_contamination.description: Q7:116: They bewitched (saharu) the eyes of the people and terrified them. Sihr (sorcery/enchantment) targets aql by presenting illusion AS reality. Modern sihr: academic gatekeeping (only approved conclusions permitted), manufactured consensus (97% agree), controlled opposition (both sides lead to same conclusion). The aql processes the data correctly but the DATA ITSELF is fabricated. Result: perfect reasoning about false premises.
perception_contamination.f_gate: PASS: propaganda effectiveness measurable; manufactured consent mechanisms documented

perception_contamination.english: Desire as god — total sensory capture
perception_contamination.quranic_text: أَفَرَأَيْتَ مَنِ اتَّخَذَ إِلَٰهَهُ هَوَاهُ وَأَضَلَّهُ اللَّهُ عَلَىٰ عِلْمٍ وَخَتَمَ عَلَىٰ سَمْعِهِ وَقَلْبِهِ وَجَعَلَ عَلَىٰ بَصَرِهِ غِشَاوَةً
perception_contamination.attack_vector: When hawa (desire) becomes ilah (god), ALL senses serve desire, not truth
perception_contamination.modern_mechanism: Entertainment industry, dopamine economy, desire-driven algorithm feeds, addiction architecture
perception_contamination.detection_pattern: DP09 (STATUS INVERSION) — desire replaces Allah as organising principle
perception_contamination.description: Q45:23: Have you seen the one who took his DESIRE as his god? Allah let him stray UPON KNOWLEDGE, sealed his hearing and heart, placed covering on his sight. The terminal contamination: when hawa becomes ilah, every sense is reprogrammed to serve desire. Sam hears only what desire wants. Basar sees only what desire craves. Fuad integrates only what desire approves. Aql reasons only toward what desire demands. The person is ala ilm (has knowledge) yet fully lost. This is the complete sensory capture — all channels hijacked.
perception_contamination.f_gate: PASS: dopamine-driven behavioral loops measurable; addiction neuroscience documents desire-override of rational faculty

perception_contamination.quranic_text: وَقَالُوا قُلُوبُنَا غُلْفٌ ۚ بَل لَّعَنَهُمُ اللَّهُ بِكُفْرِهِمْ
perception_contamination.attack_vector: Claiming natural impermeability — denying that perception CAN be reached
perception_contamination.modern_mechanism: Medical gaslighting, normalizing numbness, anti-spirituality, materialist reductionism
perception_contamination.detection_pattern: DP08 (TERMINOLOGY CORRUPTION) — spiritual language eliminated from health discourse
perception_contamination.description: Q2:88: They said our hearts are ghulf (wrapped/uncircumcised). They SELF-DIAGNOSED as naturally impermeable — claiming their inability to perceive truth is a FEATURE, not a disease. Modern form: materialist ideology claims consciousness is just neurons, emotions are just chemicals, spiritual perception does not exist. By eliminating the VOCABULARY for spiritual sensory health, the entire diagnostic framework is destroyed. A person who does not believe in fuad cannot diagnose fuad disease.
perception_contamination.f_gate: PASS: materialist reductionism impact on wellbeing measurable; meaning-void correlates with depression

perception_contamination.quranic_text: إِنَّ الَّذِينَ يُحِبُّونَ أَن تَشِيعَ الْفَاحِشَةُ فِي الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا
perception_contamination.modern_mechanism: Pornography, explicit content normalization, media violence, profanity culture
perception_contamination.detection_pattern: DP09 (STATUS INVERSION) + DP05 (TRIVIALIZATION) — indecency normalized, modesty mocked
perception_contamination.description: Q24:19: Those who love that fahishah (indecency) should spread among the believers. The attack targets ALL senses simultaneously: eyes (explicit imagery), ears (profanity, explicit lyrics), taste (substance abuse normalized), touch (physical boundary dissolution), fuad (desensitization to harm). Each sense is progressively exposed to increasing levels of fahishah until the threshold shifts — what was once shocking becomes normal. The person loses the ability to DETECT indecency because their baseline has been corrupted.
perception_contamination.f_gate: PASS: desensitization curves documented; exposure-threshold shifts measurable in psychological studies

nutrition_architecture.quranic_text: Lawful for you are livestock animals
nutrition_architecture.description: First food ruling. Cattle, sheep, goats, camels.

nutrition_architecture.quranic_text: Lawful for you is sea game and its food
nutrition_architecture.description: Sea game fresh + dried/salted. Both halal.

nutrition_architecture.english: Food of People of the Book
nutrition_architecture.quranic_text: Food of those given the Book is lawful
nutrition_architecture.description: Conditional halal: must meet base requirements.

nutrition_architecture.quranic_text: Say: the good things are made lawful
nutrition_architecture.description: Universal positive. Q5:87: do not forbid tayyibat.
Death without slaughter = blood pooling = toxins.
Flowing blood. Trapped blood after proper slaughter pardoned.

nutrition_architecture.quranic_text: What is dedicated to other than Allah
nutrition_architecture.description: Slaughter invocation to false deities = haram.
Blunt force = stress hormones + no drainage.

nutrition_architecture.quranic_text: And what predators have eaten from
Intoxicants are filth from Shaytan's work
nutrition_architecture.description: Root kh-m-r = to cover. Veils intellect.

nutrition_architecture.quranic_text: What trained hunting animals catch for you
nutrition_architecture.description: Conditions: trained + catches for you + bismillah.

nutrition_architecture.quranic_text: Isa asked: O Allah, send us a table from heaven
nutrition_architecture.description: Table from heaven for disciples. Ultimate provision.

nutrition_architecture.quranic_text: Except what you slaughter before death
nutrition_architecture.description: Rescue window: if animal still alive, proper slaughter salvages.

nutrition_architecture.quranic_text: Forbidden to you is land game while in ihram

food_production_cycle.english: Let man look at his food
food_production_cycle.scientific_process: Divine command to examine food origin
food_production_cycle.description: OPENING COMMAND. Examine food before consuming.
Stage 1: WATER. Cycle begins with rain.

food_production_cycle.scientific_process: Seed germination: radical breaks through soil
food_production_cycle.description: Stage 2: EARTH. Seed breaks through soil.

food_production_cycle.scientific_process: Cereals: complex carbs, B vitamins, fibre
food_production_cycle.description: Stage 3: GRAIN. Foundation of human diet.

food_production_cycle.modern_disruption: Wine industry hijacked grape to alcohol

food_production_cycle.scientific_process: Chlorophyll, folate, vitamin K, iron, calcium

food_production_cycle.modern_disruption: Date groves destroyed, replaced with sugar
food_production_cycle.description: Stage 7: DATES. Tree Allah gave Maryam (Q19:25).

food_production_cycle.modern_disruption: Bred for sugar at expense of phytonutrients
Factory farming removed cattle from pasture

food_production_cycle.scientific_process: Dual: human food + animal feed = integrated ecosystem

agricultural_system.description: QUESTION 1: Do you see what you sow?

agricultural_system.english: Do you grow it or do We?

agricultural_system.description: WARNING: If We willed, We would make it debris.
QUESTION 2: Do you see the water?

agricultural_system.english: Did you produce its tree or did We?

agricultural_system.divine_vs_human: DUAL: reminder of Hellfire + practical provision.

agricultural_system.description: Human response to crop failure: debt.

White/pure, pleasurable. No intoxication, no headache.
Tree itself is a test of persistence in wrong.
Forced eating. No choice, no pleasure.
Healing food for Yunus after whale. Shade + nutrition.
Food healed Yunus → sent to 100K. Food as mission prerequisite.

nutrition_intelligence.description: CORE VERSE. Allah is the Provider.
Trade = food logistics for barren Makkah.

lifecycle_architecture.quranic_text: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ مِن سُلَالَةٍ مِّن طِينٍ
lifecycle_architecture.biological_process: Mineral composition: trace elements (Fe, Zn, Cu, Mn, Se) matching earth minerals
lifecycle_architecture.description: سُلَالَة = quintessence/extract. Human body composition mirrors earth minerals exactly.

lifecycle_architecture.quranic_text: ثُمَّ جَعَلْنَاهُ نُطْفَةً فِي قَرَارٍ مَّكِينٍ
lifecycle_architecture.biological_process: Fertilisation: sperm in uterus. قَرَار مَّكِين = firm lodging = uterine wall implantation
lifecycle_architecture.description: نُطْفَة = tiny drop. قَرَار مَّكِين = secure settling place = uterus. Implantation day 6-7.

lifecycle_architecture.biological_process: Embryo attaches to uterine wall. عَلَقَة = something that clings + resembles leech + blood clot
lifecycle_architecture.description: Three meanings: (1) clinging to wall, (2) leech-like shape, (3) blood-clot appearance. All three are medically accurate.

lifecycle_architecture.biological_process: Somite stage: embryo shows tooth-marks-like indentations from somites
lifecycle_architecture.description: مُضْغَة = chewed substance. Somites create visible indentations resembling teeth marks exactly.

lifecycle_architecture.biological_process: Mesenchymal condensation → cartilage model → ossification. Skeletal framework forms BEFORE muscle.
lifecycle_architecture.description: Bones form BEFORE muscle covering — confirmed by modern embryology. Sequence matters.

lifecycle_architecture.english: Then We clothed the bones with flesh
lifecycle_architecture.biological_process: Myogenesis: muscle progenitor cells migrate to skeletal framework and differentiate
lifecycle_architecture.description: كَسَوْنَا = We clothed/covered. Muscles wrap around bones. Sequence: bones FIRST, flesh SECOND.

lifecycle_architecture.biological_process: Ensoulment: the ruh enters. Beyond biology — transition from body to person.
lifecycle_architecture.description: خَلْقًا آخَرَ = another/different creation. The body is complete; now the SOUL enters. New category entirely.

lifecycle_architecture.english: Blessed is Allah, the Best of Creators
lifecycle_architecture.biological_process: The declaration of perfection after the 7-stage sequence
lifecycle_architecture.description: SEAL of creation. Seven stages complete. أَحْسَنُ الْخَالِقِينَ = Best of Creators.

lifecycle_architecture.biological_process: Biological death: cessation of brain activity, cardiac arrest, cellular necrosis
lifecycle_architecture.description: Certain. لَمَيِّتُونَ = emphatic: you WILL die. No exception. After creation → death.

lifecycle_architecture.english: Then on Day of Resurrection you will be raised
lifecycle_architecture.biological_process: Resurrection: body reconstituted from bone remnants (Q75:3-4, Q36:78-79)
lifecycle_architecture.description: تُبْعَثُونَ = you will be raised/resurrected. The cycle COMPLETES but does not end.

lifecycle_architecture.arabic: ضَعْفٍ ثُمَّ جَعَلَ مِن بَعْدِ ضَعْفٍ قُوَّةً
lifecycle_architecture.quranic_text: اللَّهُ الَّذِي خَلَقَكُم مِّن ضَعْفٍ ثُمَّ جَعَلَ مِن بَعْدِ ضَعْفٍ قُوَّةً
lifecycle_architecture.biological_process: Childhood weakness → adult strength. Peak physical capacity age 25-35.

lifecycle_architecture.arabic: ثُمَّ جَعَلَ مِن بَعْدِ قُوَّةٍ ضَعْفًا وَشَيْبَةً
lifecycle_architecture.english: Then weakness and grey hair after strength
lifecycle_architecture.quranic_text: ثُمَّ جَعَلَ مِن بَعْدِ قُوَّةٍ ضَعْفًا وَشَيْبَةً
lifecycle_architecture.biological_process: Sarcopenia, osteoporosis, telomere shortening, grey hair (melanocyte loss)
lifecycle_architecture.description: شَيْبَة = grey hair. Decline phase: strength reverses to weakness. يَخْلُقُ مَا يَشَاءُ.

lifecycle_architecture.arabic: يَتَوَفَّى الْأَنفُسَ حِينَ مَوْتِهَا وَالَّتِي لَمْ تَمُتْ فِي مَنَامِهَا
lifecycle_architecture.english: He takes souls at death and during sleep
lifecycle_architecture.quranic_text: اللَّهُ يَتَوَفَّى الْأَنفُسَ حِينَ مَوْتِهَا وَالَّتِي لَمْ تَمُتْ فِي مَنَامِهَا
lifecycle_architecture.biological_process: Sleep: loss of consciousness, muscle paralysis, reduced metabolic rate — mini-death daily
lifecycle_architecture.description: يَتَوَفَّى = takes fully. TWO takings: (1) at death, (2) during sleep. Sleep = rehearsal for death.

lifecycle_architecture.arabic: مِن تُرَابٍ ثُمَّ مِن نُّطْفَةٍ ثُمَّ مِنْ عَلَقَةٍ
lifecycle_architecture.english: From dust, then drop, then clot...
lifecycle_architecture.quranic_text: هُوَ الَّذِي خَلَقَكُم مِّن تُرَابٍ ثُمَّ مِن نُّطْفَةٍ ثُمَّ مِنْ عَلَقَةٍ ثُمَّ يُخْرِجُكُمْ طِفْلًا ثُمَّ لِتَبْلُغُوا أَشُدَّكُمْ ثُمَّ لِتَكُونُوا شُيُوخًا
lifecycle_architecture.biological_process: Full lifecycle: dust→sperm→clot→infant→maturity→old age (+some die before)
lifecycle_architecture.description: Q40:67 = lifecycle in ONE verse: 6 stages. وَمِنكُم مَّن يُتَوَفَّىٰ مِن قَبْلُ = some taken before.

death_mechanism.mechanism: Violent soul extraction: angels pull soul from disbeliever — tears from every vein
death_mechanism.description: غَرْقًا = deeply/violently. For the disbeliever: soul resists, extraction is agonising.

death_mechanism.mechanism: Gentle soul extraction: angels ease soul from believer — like water from vessel
death_mechanism.description: نَشْطًا = gently/smoothly. For the believer: soul exits willingly, peacefully.

death_mechanism.mechanism: Angels moving through cosmos carrying souls — سَبْح = swimming/gliding
death_mechanism.description: سَبْح = gliding/swimming. Angels transport souls from body to their destination.

death_mechanism.mechanism: Angels racing to execute divine commands at death
death_mechanism.description: سَبْقًا = racing/preceding. Speed of divine execution — death arrives on time.

death_mechanism.mechanism: Angels arranging the affairs of death, burial, soul passage
death_mechanism.description: مُدَبِّرَات = managers/arrangers. The administrative angels of death.

death_mechanism.mechanism: Death rattle: fluid accumulates in throat/chest at end of life
death_mechanism.description: تَرَاقِي = collarbones/clavicles. The soul rises through the body at death.

death_mechanism.mechanism: Terminal agony: consciousness fluctuations, hallucinations, pain
death_mechanism.description: سَكْرَة = intoxication/stupor. بِالْحَقِّ = with truth. Death reveals what was hidden.

death_mechanism.english: When leg is intertwined with leg
death_mechanism.mechanism: Legs stiffen/intertwine at death — rigor mortis begins distally
death_mechanism.description: السَّاق = shins/legs. Rigor mortis begins in extremities. Worldly journey meets afterlife journey.

death_mechanism.quranic_text: قُلْ يَتَوَفَّاكُم مَّلَكُ الْمَوْتِ الَّذِي وُكِّلَ بِكُمْ
death_mechanism.mechanism: Single angel assigned to take souls — يَتَوَفَّاكُم = takes you fully
death_mechanism.description: وُكِّلَ بِكُمْ = entrusted with you. Specific assignment. ثُمَّ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكُمْ تُرْجَعُونَ = then returned.

death_mechanism.mechanism: Universal biological law — 100% mortality rate, zero exceptions
death_mechanism.description: ذَائِقَة = tasting. Death is TASTED — experienced, not just observed. Q3:185, Q29:57 repeat.

spirit_infusion.process: Morphogenesis: body proportioning — limbs, organs, symmetry
spirit_infusion.description: Body proportioned BEFORE spirit. Physical form must be complete first.

spirit_infusion.english: He breathed into him of His spirit
spirit_infusion.process: Ensoulment: the ruh (spirit) enters the body — transition from matter to living being
spirit_infusion.significance: The DEFINING moment. مِن رُّوحِهِ = from HIS spirit. Not a piece of Allah — a creation from Him.
spirit_infusion.description: نَفَخَ = blew/breathed. The spirit is breathed IN — not inserted, not placed. Breath = life force.

spirit_infusion.process: Three faculties activated by spirit: hearing (first), sight (second), heart-mind (third)
spirit_infusion.significance: Spirit activates sensory + cognitive faculties. Without ruh, organs are dead matter.
spirit_infusion.description: السَّمْع→الْأَبْصَار→الْأَفْئِدَة. Same order as H5 sensory_architecture. Consistent.

spirit_infusion.process: Human body = earth minerals. Clay = silicon, aluminium, iron, calcium compounds.
spirit_infusion.significance: Physical body from earth. Mineral composition matches.
spirit_infusion.description: بَدَأَ = began. Creation BEGAN from clay. First Adam, then descendants from fluid.

spirit_infusion.quranic_text: ثُمَّ جَعَلَ نَسْلَهُ مِن سُلَالَةٍ مِّن مَّاءٍ مَّهِينٍ
spirit_infusion.process: Reproduction: descendants from seminal fluid. مَّهِين = despised/insignificant.
spirit_infusion.significance: Humility of origin. مَاء مَّهِين = fluid that humans consider lowly.
spirit_infusion.description: نَسْلَهُ = his progeny. After Adam (clay), all subsequent humans from fluid.

spirit_infusion.process: Divine rebuke: given spirit, hearing, sight, hearts — yet ungrateful
spirit_infusion.description: SEAL of the creation passage. Three gifts (hearing, sight, hearts) → little thanks.

spirit_infusion.english: I am creating a human from clay
spirit_infusion.quranic_text: إِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَالِقٌ بَشَرًا مِّن طِينٍ
spirit_infusion.process: Divine announcement to angels: human creation from clay
spirit_infusion.significance: Adam = first human. Direct creation, not evolution.
spirit_infusion.description: Allah announced to angels BEFORE creating. خَالِقٌ = present participle: I am [about to be] creating.

spirit_infusion.arabic: فَإِذَا سَوَّيْتُهُ وَنَفَخْتُ فِيهِ مِن رُّوحِي فَقَعُوا لَهُ سَاجِدِينَ
spirit_infusion.english: When I proportion him and breathe My spirit, prostrate to him
spirit_infusion.quranic_text: فَإِذَا سَوَّيْتُهُ وَنَفَخْتُ فِيهِ مِن رُّوحِي فَقَعُوا لَهُ سَاجِدِينَ
spirit_infusion.process: Two conditions for angel prostration: (1) proportioned, (2) spirit breathed
spirit_infusion.significance: Spirit breathing = what made Adam worthy of angel prostration. The ruh = dignity source.
spirit_infusion.description: فَقَعُوا = fall down. سَاجِدِينَ = prostrating. Angels prostrate to the SPIRIT-BEARING human.

transition_states.description: The sky splitting = end of worldly existence. Transition from dunya to akhirah.

transition_states.english: And has responded to its Lord as it must
transition_states.description: أَذِنَتْ = listened/obeyed. وَحُقَّتْ = as is its right/duty. Creation obeys its Creator.

transition_states.english: And when the earth is spread out
transition_states.description: Earth flattened/extended for judgment. Mountains leveled (Q78:20).

transition_states.english: And has cast out what is in it and emptied
transition_states.description: Earth expels its dead. Bodies return to surface for resurrection. تَخَلَّت = emptied itself.

transition_states.arabic: يَا أَيُّهَا الْإِنسَانُ إِنَّكَ كَادِحٌ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ كَدْحًا فَمُلَاقِيهِ
transition_states.english: O man, you are toiling toward your Lord and will meet Him
transition_states.quranic_text: يَا أَيُّهَا الْإِنسَانُ إِنَّكَ كَادِحٌ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ كَدْحًا فَمُلَاقِيهِ
transition_states.description: كَادِح = toiling/striving. Every moment moves toward meeting Allah. فَمُلَاقِيهِ = you WILL meet Him.

transition_states.english: As for who is given his book in his right hand
transition_states.quranic_text: فَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِيَ كِتَابَهُ بِيَمِينِهِ فَسَوْفَ يُحَاسَبُ حِسَابًا يَسِيرًا
transition_states.description: Right hand = easy reckoning. يَسِيرًا = easy. يَنقَلِبُ إِلَىٰ أَهْلِهِ مَسْرُورًا = returns to family joyful.

transition_states.arabic: وَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِيَ كِتَابَهُ وَرَاءَ ظَهْرِهِ
transition_states.english: As for who is given his book behind his back
transition_states.quranic_text: وَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِيَ كِتَابَهُ وَرَاءَ ظَهْرِهِ فَسَوْفَ يَدْعُو ثُبُورًا
transition_states.description: Behind back = calls for destruction. يَصْلَىٰ سَعِيرًا = will burn in blaze.

transition_states.quranic_text: وَمِن وَرَائِهِم بَرْزَخٌ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ يُبْعَثُونَ
transition_states.description: بَرْزَخ = barrier/isthmus. The state between death and judgment. Cannot return.

transition_states.arabic: وَاللَّيْلِ إِذَا يَغْشَىٰ وَالنَّهَارِ إِذَا تَجَلَّىٰ
transition_states.english: By the night when it covers, by the day when it shines
transition_states.quranic_text: وَاللَّيْلِ إِذَا يَغْشَىٰ وَالنَّهَارِ إِذَا تَجَلَّىٰ وَمَا خَلَقَ الذَّكَرَ وَالْأُنثَىٰ
transition_states.description: Night/day + male/female = paired cycles. Life-death embedded in daily rhythm.

mortality_intelligence.mechanism: Distraction from death through accumulation (wealth, children, status)
mortality_intelligence.description: التَّكَاثُر = mutual boasting of abundance. أَلْهَاكُم = diverted/distracted. Accumulation as death-denial.

mortality_intelligence.mechanism: Death as "visit" — زُرْتُم implies temporary visit, not permanent
mortality_intelligence.description: زُرْتُم = you visited. الْمَقَابِر = the graves. Death described as visiting — implying return (resurrection).

mortality_intelligence.english: Nay! You will come to know
mortality_intelligence.quranic_text: كَلَّا سَوْفَ تَعْلَمُونَ ثُمَّ كَلَّا سَوْفَ تَعْلَمُونَ
mortality_intelligence.mechanism: DOUBLE warning: repeated twice for emphasis — certainty of afterlife knowledge
mortality_intelligence.description: كَلَّا = Nay/Never. Repeated TWICE. سَوْفَ = future certain. You WILL know.

mortality_intelligence.mechanism: Three levels of certainty: عِلْم (knowledge), عَيْن (sight), حَقّ (truth) — Q102:5,7 + Q69:51
mortality_intelligence.description: If you knew with certainty... Three grades: knowing about fire, seeing fire, being in fire.

mortality_intelligence.english: You will surely see the Hellfire
mortality_intelligence.mechanism: Visual certainty: عَيْنَ الْيَقِينِ = seeing with certainty
mortality_intelligence.description: لَتَرَوُنَّها = you will DEFINITELY see it. عَيْنَ الْيَقِينِ = eye of certainty. Cannot deny what you see.

mortality_intelligence.english: Then you will be asked about blessings
mortality_intelligence.mechanism: Accountability for every blessing: food, water, health, safety, senses — ALL questioned
mortality_intelligence.description: النَّعِيم = blessings/comforts. Every blessing will be accounted for. Links to ALL body heptads.

mortality_intelligence.english: Those who do not expect to meet Us
mortality_intelligence.quranic_text: إِنَّ الَّذِينَ لَا يَرْجُونَ لِقَاءَنَا وَرَضُوا بِالْحَيَاةِ الدُّنْيَا
mortality_intelligence.mechanism: Death denial = attachment to dunya. رَضُوا بِالْحَيَاةِ الدُّنْيَا = satisfied with worldly life.
mortality_intelligence.description: Operator pattern: deny afterlife → maximise worldly extraction → no accountability fear.

mortality_intelligence.english: Does man think We will not reassemble his bones?
mortality_intelligence.quranic_text: أَيَحْسَبُ الْإِنسَانُ أَلَّن نَّجْمَعَ عِظَامَهُ بَلَىٰ قَادِرِينَ عَلَىٰ أَن نُّسَوِّيَ بَنَانَهُ
mortality_intelligence.mechanism: Resurrection denial refuted: We can reassemble even fingerprints (بَنَانَهُ = fingertips)
mortality_intelligence.description: بَنَانَهُ = his fingertips. Fingerprint uniqueness cited 1400 years before forensic science.

lifecycle_cross_refs.description: You will die = every soul tastes death
Angel of death reverses spirit infusion

body_nodes.notes: FK chain root — ground contact in sujud + qiyam
Wudu verse: وَأَرْجُلَكُمْ إِلَى الْكَعْبَيْنِ — wash feet to the ankles
From ر-ك-ب (to ride/mount). Ground contact in sujud
Primary pivot for ruku. Deepest flexion in sujud
Lumbar region. 5 vertebrae. Ibn Sina distributed flexion point
Thoracic endpoint. Arm chain branches here
قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّي وَهَنَ الْعَظْمُ مِنِّي وَاشْتَعَلَ الرَّأْسُ شَيْبًا — Forehead contact in sujud
Wudu verse: وَأَيْدِيَكُمْ إِلَى الْمَرَافِقِ — wash hands to the elbows
Palm contact in sujud. Tashahhud index finger pointing. Length includes hand to fingertip
يَوْمَ يُحْمَىٰ عَلَيْهَا — sujud contact, mark of the believers (Q48:29)
Sujud contact — forehead AND nose on ground
Sujud contact — palms flat on ground. Tashahhud on thighs
الَّذِي أَنقَضَ ظَهْرَكَ — the spine as a complete unit
أَلَمْ نَشْرَحْ لَكَ صَدْرَكَ — chest expansion during qiyam breathing
Complete exercise system: convergence (sujud), lateral sweep (tasleem)
